fullText: ゴウン崔韓国, 中国, 日本の挿肘木に関する研究 (その1): 挿肘木の形態についてhttps://architecturasinica.org/bibl/2MC4TT3Qhttps://www.zotero.org/groups/architecturasinica/items/2MC4TT3Qhttps://www.zotero.org/groups/2267085/items/2MC4TT3Q日本建築学会計画系論文集672002321-326This study is about the comparison of the Sashihijiki which is found in traditional architecture in Far Eastern (i.e., Korea, China and Japan). Sashihijiki is one of components in traditional East Asian wooden bracket systems. Sashihijiki can be defined as a special element of the wooden bracket systems in association with particular eras and regions in Far East. However, from the historical and regional perspectives, comparative studies on Sashihijiki have hitherto been unsatisfactory. This study hence attempts to make clear the similarities and differences of Sashihijiki among three countries through mutual comparison. 崔ゴウン. “韓国, 中国, 日本の挿肘木に関する研究 (その1): 挿肘木の形態について.” 日本建築学会計画系論文集 67, no. 556 (2002): 321–26. https://doi.org/10.3130/aija.67.321_2. 崔ゴウン, 韓国, 中国, 日本の挿肘木に関する研究 (その1): 挿肘木の形態について, 日本建築学会計画系論文集 67, no. 556 (2002): 321–26, https://doi.org/10.3130/aija.67.321_2.

fullText: 立丽刘LiliLiu旅顺博物馆藏大连地区出土汉代陶建筑名器研究旅顺博物馆藏大连地区出土汉代陶建筑名器研究Lü Shun bo wu guan cang da lian di qu chu tu han dai tao jian zhu ming qi yan jiuLü Shun bowuguan cang Dalian diqu chutu Han dai tao jianzhu mingqi yanjiu https://architecturasinica.org/bibl/3AAZAAFLhttps://www.zotero.org/groups/architecturasinica/items/3AAZAAFLhttps://www.zotero.org/groups/2267085/items/3AAZAAFL考古与文物考古與文物Kao gu yu wen wuKaogu yu wenwu201586-91旅顺博物馆收藏有陶屋、陶楼、陶厕所猪圈等类型的建筑明器。长期以来，未曾对此进行过系统地研究，以 致在器物的类型、名称及用途上说法不一，莫衷一是。本文从考古类型学角度入手进行分析研究，以正模糊不清的分 类模式，从而进一步探讨汉代大连与中原地区的关系。 刘立丽. “旅顺博物馆藏大连地区出土汉代陶建筑名器研究.” 考古与文物, no. 5 (2015): 86–91. 刘立丽, 旅顺博物馆藏大连地区出土汉代陶建筑名器研究, 考古与文物, no. 5 (2015): 86–91.

fullText: 臣明曹ChenmingCao大同華嚴寺的歷史變遷大同華嚴寺的歷史變遷Da tong hua yan si de li shi bian qianDatong huayan si de lishi bianqianhttps://architecturasinica.org/bibl/3E4JZ6IXhttps://www.zotero.org/groups/architecturasinica/items/3E4JZ6IXhttps://www.zotero.org/groups/2267085/items/3E4JZ6IX山西大同大學學報(社會科學版)26201235-42大同華嚴寺，是遼代在舊寺院基礎上興建的具有與皇家祖廟功能相結合的寺院。 在遼、金、元時期，寺院規模宏大，高僧輩出。 元末明初遭毀壞後未能完整修復，明中期分為上、下兩部分，其中以海慧殿修復、大雄寶殿內塑像的工程最大，佈局上受禪宗的一些影響。 清代華嚴寺單體建築變小，佈局上反映的教義較複雜，加入儒、釋、道等多種複雜成分。 曹臣明. “大同華嚴寺的歷史變遷.” 山西大同大學學報(社會科學版) 26, no. 02 (2012): 35–42. 曹臣明, 大同華嚴寺的歷史變遷, 山西大同大學學報(社會科學版) 26, no. 02 (2012): 35–42.

fullText: 旭赵XuZhao唐宋时期私家祖考祭祀礼制考论唐宋時期私家祖考祭祀禮制考論Tang song shi qi si jia zu kao ji si li zhi kao lunTangsong shiqi sijia zukao jisi lizhi kaolunhttps://architecturasinica.org/bibl/44M2IYD7https://www.zotero.org/groups/architecturasinica/items/44M2IYD7https://www.zotero.org/groups/2267085/items/44M2IYD7中国史研究中國史研究Zhongguo shi yan jiuZhongguoshi yanjiu200817-44私家的祖考祭祀是与帝王和朝廷的宗庙祭祀相对应而言的。唐宋时期的私家祖考祭祀形式发生了重大改变,即由官方制礼的家庙衰落的同时,在官方认可或默许下,私家的影堂祭祀大为发展,而晚宋时期朱熹祠堂的构想为明代官方礼制所承袭。从家庙到影堂再到祠堂,不但是私家祖考祭祀形式的演变,而且是一个礼制在官方认同的前提下不断下移的过程。从私家祭祀祖考的范围上讲,唐宋时期的重要演变是由祭祀直系祖先,逐渐出现了"祭及旁亲"乃至同族"共庙"的现象。这恰是传统宗法制度在唐宋时期的重要演变和宗子制新的表现形式。 赵旭. “唐宋时期私家祖考祭祀礼制考论.” 中国史研究, no. 03 (2008): 17–44. 赵旭, 唐宋时期私家祖考祭祀礼制考论, 中国史研究, no. 03 (2008): 17–44.

title: Idealizing a Chinese Style
Journal of the Society of Architectural Historians
publisher: [Society of Architectural Historians, University of California Press]
fullText: DelinLaiIdealizing a Chinese Stylehttps://architecturasinica.org/bibl/46QBHARShttps://www.zotero.org/groups/architecturasinica/items/46QBHARShttps://www.zotero.org/groups/2267085/items/46QBHARSJournal of the Society of Architectural Historians73[Society of Architectural Historians, University of California Press]201461-90The National Central Museum in Nanjing (1935–48) was co-designed by the most distinguished architectural historian in twentieth-century China—Liang Sicheng. It has long been regarded, however, as a representative work of “conservative revivalism” in modern Chinese architectural history. Idealizing a Chinese Style: Rethinking Early Writings on Chinese Architecture and the Design of the National Central Museum in Nanjing attempts to demonstrate the creativity of the design process, Lin Huiyin, and the architects’ ideal for a Chinese-style modern architecture. This ideal, Delin Lai argues, is profoundly rooted in the expectation of Chinese intellectuals for a “Chinese renaissance,” for which the Chinese architectural past was studied, evaluated, and more importantly, redefined through a dialogue with the contemporary architectural discourses and historiography formed in the West. The National Central Museum epitomizes this search for an ideal. Lai, Delin. “Idealizing a Chinese Style.” Journal of the Society of Architectural Historians 73, no. 1 (2014): 61–90. https://doi.org/10.1525/jsah.2014.73.1.61. Delin Lai, Idealizing a Chinese Style, Journal of the Society of Architectural Historians 73, no. 1 (2014): 61–90, https://doi.org/10.1525/jsah.2014.73.1.61.

keyword: Of Palaces and Pagodas: Palatial Symbolism in the Buddhist Architecture of Early Medieval China
author: Tracy Miller
title: Of Palaces and Pagodas: Palatial Symbolism in the Buddhist Architecture of Early Medieval China
Frontiers of History in China
fullText: TracyMillerOf Palaces and Pagodas: Palatial Symbolism in the Buddhist Architecture of Early Medieval Chinahttps://architecturasinica.org/bibl/4767JG7Hhttps://www.zotero.org/groups/architecturasinica/items/4767JG7Hhttps://www.zotero.org/groups/2267085/items/4767JG7HFrontiers of History in China102015222-263This paper is an inquiry into possible motivations for representing timber-frame architecture in the Buddhist context. By comparing the architectural language of early Buddhist narrative panels and cave temples rendered in stone, I suggest that architectural representation was employed in both masonry and timber to create symbolically charged worship spaces. The replication and multiplication of palace forms on cave walls, in “pagodas” (futu 浮圖, fotu 佛圖, or ta 塔), and as the crowning element of free-standing pillars reflect a common desire to express and harness divine power, a desire that resulted in a wide variety of mountainous monuments in China. Finally, I provide evidence to suggest that the towering Buddhist monuments of early medieval China are linked morphologically and symbolically to the towering temples of South Asia through the use of both palace forms and sacred maṇḍalas as a means to express the divine power and expansive presence of the Buddha. Miller, Tracy. “Of Palaces and Pagodas: Palatial Symbolism in the Buddhist Architecture of Early Medieval China.” Frontiers of History in China 10, no. 2 (2015): 222–63. https://doi.org/10.3868/s020-004-015-0014-1. Tracy Miller, Of Palaces and Pagodas: Palatial Symbolism in the Buddhist Architecture of Early Medieval China, Frontiers of History in China 10, no. 2 (2015): 222–63, https://doi.org/10.3868/s020-004-015-0014-1.

fullText: 红超石HongchaoShi苏南浙南传统建筑小木作匠艺研究蘇南浙南傳統建築小木作匠藝研究Su nan zhe nan chuan tong jian zhu xiao mu zuo jiang yi yan jiuSunan zhenan chuantong jianzhu xiaomuzuo jiangyi yanjiuhttps://architecturasinica.org/bibl/5GJS5L8Xhttps://www.zotero.org/groups/architecturasinica/items/5GJS5L8Xhttps://www.zotero.org/groups/2267085/items/5GJS5L8X2005中国传统建筑的木作体系包括大木作和小木作,大木作是建筑的梁柱框架结构,而丰富的小木作则对建筑空间进行细致的划分,赋予建筑不同的“性格”与“身份”,使建筑的使用成为可能,但对传统建筑小木作的研究却一直在学界颇为“寂静”。本论文选择了苏南和浙南两个点的传统建筑小木作作为研究对象,通过与传统小木作工匠进行直面的交流、深入匠师们施工的现场对制作工艺和流程进行观察和访谈,并探访两个地区有代表性的小木作实例,从而获取大量的原始资料。论文以这些原始资料为基础,并参考历史文献,从形式规范、工艺技术、礼仪形制、艺术风格等多个层面与角度对这两个地区的传统建筑小木作进行系统的整合论述,并在横向的比较研究中梳理出两个地区传统建筑小木作的营造技术和设计意念。本论文共分六章,第一章对两个地区传统建筑小木作的营造基础进行综合论述,包括:传统建筑小木作的工匠、营造尺、工具、设计和传统匠艺的承继五个方面;第二章到第五章分别对两个地区的门与窗、藻井与天花、内外隔断、神龛的设计意匠与制作工艺进行了详细的论述和比较研究;第六章为综述,对苏南和浙南传统建筑小木作的历史文化基础和现代遭遇两个方面进行了分析。全文约7.6万余字,图表240余幅。 石红超. “苏南浙南传统建筑小木作匠艺研究.” 硕士, 东南大学, 2005. 石红超, 苏南浙南传统建筑小木作匠艺研究 (硕士, 东南大学, 2005).

fullText: 毅华孙YihuaSun翼(叶)形栱名称考—敦煌吐蕃建筑画研究翼(葉)形栱名稱考—敦煌吐蕃建築畫研究Yi (ye) xing gong ming cheng kao-dunhuang tubo jian zhu hua yan jiuYi(ye)xinggong mingcheng kao--dunhuang tubo jianzhuhua yanjiuhttps://architecturasinica.org/bibl/5IP53L5Ahttps://www.zotero.org/groups/architecturasinica/items/5IP53L5Ahttps://www.zotero.org/groups/2267085/items/5IP53L5A中国建筑史论汇刊Zhongguo jian zhu shi lun hui kan2017113-121敦煌在历史上曾经被吐蕃统治达半个多世纪,因而在敦煌石窟中唐即吐蕃时期的建筑画中保留了早期藏民族建筑的一些典型特征。经过一千多年的演变后,在如今广大的藏民族居住区域内,有些建筑部件或消失,或演变为其他类型,其中在中原地区流行的翼形栱样式与吐蕃壁画中的一种叶状斗拱即叶形拱近似,而对于叶形栱的考证是通过吐蕃文献记载与壁画形象相互印证实现的。中原建筑斗拱上的翼形栱出现时间均晚于吐蕃时期,且"翼"与"叶"读音相近,再加之吐蕃语与汉语的差异原因,导致吐蕃地区树叶形状的叶形栱演变为"翼形拱"。考虑到当时中原与吐蕃的文化交流,两地建筑相互影响也是有可能的。对于建筑研究而言,需要通过大量的图像对比才能作出比较,正是由于图像、文献、实物的互为补充,才使得敦煌壁画中的建筑画成为一种当时社会生活的现实反映。 孙毅华. “翼(叶)形栱名称考—敦煌吐蕃建筑画研究.” 中国建筑史论汇刊, no. 第2期 (2017): 113–21. 孙毅华, 翼(叶)形栱名称考—敦煌吐蕃建筑画研究, 中国建筑史论汇刊, no. 第2期 (2017): 113–21.

fullText: 正瑾魏宁白ZhengjinWeiNingBai南京栖霞山千佛岩石窟寺考古方法论的实践南京棲霞山千佛巖石窟寺考古方法論的實踐Nanjing qi xia shan qian fo yan shi ku si kao gu fang fa lun de shi jianNanjing qixiashan qianfoyan shikusi kaogu fangfalun de shijianhttps://architecturasinica.org/bibl/5RIK2AS2https://www.zotero.org/groups/architecturasinica/items/5RIK2AS2https://www.zotero.org/groups/2267085/items/5RIK2AS2石窟寺研究石窟寺研究Shi ku si yan jiuShikusi yanjiu201877-86+449-450+87-104+451+105南京栖霞山千佛岩石窟考古是中国石窟寺考古学方法论的一次重要实践。本文介绍了运用考古学的层位学、类型学方法获取现场考古资料,梳理历史文献形成石窟发展时间节点,运用考古学的方法进行类型分析、分组分期的排年,对洞窟开凿和重修的年代考证,形成考古报告的过程,显示方法论实践的重要意义。 魏正瑾, and 白宁. “南京栖霞山千佛岩石窟寺考古方法论的实践.” 石窟寺研究, no. 00 (2018): 77-86+449-450+87-104+451+105. 魏正瑾 and 白宁, 南京栖霞山千佛岩石窟寺考古方法论的实践, 石窟寺研究, no. 00 (2018): 77-86+449-450+87-104+451+105.

fullText: 贺大龙DalongHe潞城原起寺大雄宝殿年代新考潞城原起寺大雄寶殿年代新考Lucheng yuan qi si da xiong bao dian nian dai xin kaohttps://architecturasinica.org/bibl/5S9REM9Shttps://www.zotero.org/groups/architecturasinica/items/5S9REM9Shttps://www.zotero.org/groups/2267085/items/5S9REM9S文物文物Wen wuWenwu201159-74<正>原起寺位于山西省潞城市黄牛蹄乡辛安村东面的凤凰山顶。山脚下东侧是潞城和黎城通往平顺的公路交汇处,北侧是浊漳河,过河约1公里便是著名的天台庵。浊漳河两岸汇集了由唐至清的中国传统木结构建筑近百座,其中保存唐、五代、宋、金、元的早期木构建筑10余座,是中国早期木构建筑遗存的密集地。 贺大龙. “潞城原起寺大雄宝殿年代新考.” 文物, no. 1 (2011): 59–74. https://doi.org/10.13619/j.cnki.cn11-1532/k.2011.01.010. 贺大龙, 潞城原起寺大雄宝殿年代新考, 文物, no. 1 (2011): 59–74, https://doi.org/10.13619/j.cnki.cn11-1532/k.2011.01.010.

fullText: 牛田NiuTian粉墙塔影 --上海松江兴圣教寺塔粉牆塔影 --上海松江興聖教寺塔Fen qiang ta ying -- Shanghai Song jiang Xing sheng jiao si taFenqiang ta ying -- Shanghai Songjiang Xingshengjiao si tahttps://architecturasinica.org/bibl/63QAUNNUhttps://www.zotero.org/groups/architecturasinica/items/63QAUNNUhttps://www.zotero.org/groups/2267085/items/63QAUNNU建筑工人建築工人Jian zhu gong renJianzhu gongren320021塔是我国佛教建筑中的一个特殊类型,在留存至今的古建奇构中,它占了相当的比重。与构图严谨、有条有序铺陈排列的传统建筑群体相比,塔那高耸突兀、直插云天的艺术形象具有非常鲜明的个性。也成了百姓大众喜闻乐见的古建筑艺术品。一开始,塔是古代寺院的中心,其他建筑均绕塔而建,僧侣也围着塔进行各种宗教仪式。后来,塔的位置渐渐让给供奉佛像的大殿,甚至脱离寺院 田牛. “粉墙塔影 --上海松江兴圣教寺塔.” 建筑工人 3 (2002): 1. 田牛, 粉墙塔影 --上海松江兴圣教寺塔, 建筑工人 3 (2002): 1.

fullText: 妍刘薇陈妍YanLiu隋—宋扬州城防若干复原问题探讨隋—宋揚州城防若干復原問題探討Sui —Song Yangzhou cheng fang ruo gan fu yuan wen ti tan taoSui —Song Yangzhou chengfang ruogan fuyuan wenti tantaohttps://architecturasinica.org/bibl/67A76PN3https://www.zotero.org/groups/architecturasinica/items/67A76PN3https://www.zotero.org/groups/2267085/items/67A76PN32009本文建立一套“宏观—区域历史地理与军事地理研究、中观—城市城防设施布局研究、微观—城防建筑的结构与构造”的城防研究体系,在此体系中审视隋代至宋南时期的扬州城防设施建设。本文首先从宏观角度分析了历史上扬州及与其隔江相望的镇江(唐润州)的历史地理特征和军事地理地位,指出二者在军事上具有相互依存、相互保障与制约的关系。随后,进入中观层面,首先梳理了扬州历史建设史,并对本文重点研究时间段—隋至宋期间关于城市建设的史料进行了梳理,并分析一些在前人研究中使用混乱的史料。其次,对扬州城防体系进行分析,通过对考古工作及以前人城市平面复原图的概述,指出现有城市复原图的疑点与问题,并通过几个特殊的视角来审视城市平面布局,包括:历史人物的行程路线、战争的攻防守路线、城门、水门的类型及分布等。最后,提出本文的隋—宋各时代平面复原图。此后,本文梳理了以傅熹年先生为代表的扬州唐宋城门复原研究工作现状,并指出其问题:缺乏对迄今唐宋考古资料的整理,并缺少对复原本体中考古揭示的细节的重视。为了弥补上述问题,本文汇总、统计、整理了迄今已发表的关于唐、宋时期城门和城墙的考古资料,并对排叉柱式城门道的构造进行详细的分析探讨。随后,对历史文献中所记载的唐宋城市城墙高度、宽度数据进行统计学分析,指出唐宋期间城墙高宽变化的趋势。以上关于城门和城墙的整理,直接为本文的研究主体扬州唐宋城门复原提供了依据。由此,本文分析了扬州唐宋城市遗址中由考古揭示的城门规模及形制的特点及其演化。选择了五个具有代表意义的重要城门进行计算机三维模拟复原。其中,对于唐代罗城西垣最南门的复原,重点探讨了扬州唐代排叉柱式城门的形制与构造;对唐宋城南门的复原,重点探讨了晚唐扬州正南门的形制规模,并试图还原考古尚未证实的城门平面布局;对宋大城西门的复原,重点探讨了早期拱券城门的形制;对唐宋城东门的复原,重点探讨了南宋瓮城至城濠间复杂的城防体系;对宋大城北门的复原,重点探讨了南宋水城门结构构造。对城门结构、形制的复原,属于本文的中观与微观部分研究。由宏观、中观和微观的研究,对扬州隋至宋重要发展阶段的城防研究形成了比较客观和科学的认识,也在某种程度上弥补了扬州城市建设史及中国古代城市史的不足。 刘妍. “隋—宋扬州城防若干复原问题探讨.” 硕士学位论文, 东南大学, 2009. https://kns.cnki.net/KCMS/detail/detail.aspx?dbcode=CMFD&dbname=CMFD2012&filename=2010219940.nh. 刘妍, 隋—宋扬州城防若干复原问题探讨 (硕士学位论文, 东南大学, 2009), https://kns.cnki.net/KCMS/detail/detail.aspx?dbcode=CMFD&dbname=CMFD2012&filename=2010219940.nh.

fullText: 爱国杨Ai'guoYang“祠主受祭图”再检讨“祠主受祭圖”再檢討“Ci zhu shou ji tu" zai jian tao"Cizhu shoujitu" zai jiantaohttps://architecturasinica.org/bibl/6Q8VF4WMhttps://www.zotero.org/groups/architecturasinica/items/6Q8VF4WMhttps://www.zotero.org/groups/2267085/items/6Q8VF4WM文艺研究文藝研究Wen yi yan jiuWenyi yanjiu2007130-137“祠主受祭图”因其在汉代墓上祠堂中所处的重要位置,受到学人的高度关注,数十年来,关于它的图像意义的争论迄未间断。本文认为,只有从以下三点出发,才有可能比较正确地认识该图的意义:一是墓上祠堂的功能;二是以墓主为中心的图像布局;三是从尸到遗像的祭祀对象象征物的转移。 杨爱国. “‘祠主受祭图’再检讨.” 文艺研究, no. 2 (2007): 130–37. 杨爱国, ‘祠主受祭图’再检讨, 文艺研究, no. 2 (2007): 130–37.

fullText: 琳林LinLin《营造法式》中的丁头栱及其相关概念辨析——兼论日韩建筑中所见的插栱和丁头栱《營造法式》中的丁頭栱及其相關概念辨析——兼論日韓建築中所見的插栱和丁頭栱"Ying zao fa shi" zhong de ding tou gong ji qi xiang guan gai nian bian xi -- jian lun ri han jian zhu zhong suo jian de cha gong he ding tou gong"Yingzao fashi" zhong de dingtougong jiqi xiangguan gainian bianxi -- jianlun rihan jianzhu zhong suojian de chagong he dingtougonghttps://architecturasinica.org/bibl/6SVWQI3Jhttps://www.zotero.org/groups/architecturasinica/items/6SVWQI3Jhttps://www.zotero.org/groups/2267085/items/6SVWQI3J建筑史建築史Jian zhu shiJianzhu shi201888-102既有文献中,"丁头栱"与"插栱"是两个含混的概念。"丁头栱"一词虽然见诸于宋《营造法式》(以下简称《法式》),但与《法式》中极苛刻的界定不同,在当代古建筑研究文献中,其所指已被极大的扩充了。本文在厘清《法式》中的丁头栱及若干相关构件的概念后,指出:在法式中真正能被称为丁头栱的,只有牵梁或乳栿的下方的一类半截栱构件,而其他的半截栱形态的构件,都有各自明确的名称,如入柱华栱、杷头栱、华栱头,或小木作中的卷头,等等。进而进一步辨析丁头栱与插栱的关系,并尝试概括性总结日韩建筑中丁头栱和插栱的种类。 林琳. “《营造法式》中的丁头栱及其相关概念辨析——兼论日韩建筑中所见的插栱和丁头栱.” 建筑史, no. 1 (2018): 88–102. 林琳, 《营造法式》中的丁头栱及其相关概念辨析——兼论日韩建筑中所见的插栱和丁头栱, 建筑史, no. 1 (2018): 88–102.

fullText: 聪唐CongTang两宋时期的木造现象及其工匠意识探析——从保国寺大殿与《营造法式》的构件体系比较入手兩宋時期的木造現象及其工匠意識探析——從保國寺大殿與《營造法式》的構件體系比較入手Liang song shi qi de mu zao xian xiang ji qi gong jiang yi shi tan xi -- cong Bao guo si da dian yu "Ying zao fa shi" de gou jian ti xi bi jiao ru shouLiangsong shiqi de muzao xianxiang jiqi gongjiang yishi tanxi -- cong Baoguosi dadian yu "Yingzao fashi" de goujian tixi bijiao rushouhttps://architecturasinica.org/bibl/6UMU8WKYhttps://www.zotero.org/groups/architecturasinica/items/6UMU8WKYhttps://www.zotero.org/groups/2267085/items/6UMU8WKY2012保国寺大殿作为北宋时期江南地区十分典型的木构实例，呈现出许多重要的木造现象；《营造法式》是北宋政府在全国刊行的工程规范书，大量记录了当时的建造技术和形制；二者既有交集，也有差异。本文以此二者为线索性研究对象，将目光焦距于两宋时期，在当时的南北技术体系既有分立、也有交融的背景下，通过对构件体系等信息的分析和比较，试图解读中古时期木造现象中的工匠意识。 研究分为构件、构造、和构架三个层次，大致依照从微观到宏观的顺序展开。在前两章中，斗型、棋型的设置反映出工匠对构件加工制作过程的安排和控制，并且传达出工匠关于斗棋立面尺度构成的不同设计思路。第三章对丁头棋现象的梳理论及其从属的斗棋类型和构架意识；探寻实例中多样化丁头棋现象的实质来源。末尾两章通过分析古建筑某一局部构架的木造现象，说明建筑结构或形式的演变。一方面，局部的构架关系反映出建筑整体结构的演化过程；另一方面，结构要素和形式要素的互动透露出了古建筑设计程序和方法的差异和转变。 唐聪. “两宋时期的木造现象及其工匠意识探析——从保国寺大殿与《营造法式》的构件体系比较入手.” 东南大学, 建筑历史与理论, 2012. 唐聪, 两宋时期的木造现象及其工匠意识探析——从保国寺大殿与《营造法式》的构件体系比较入手 (东南大学, 建筑历史与理论, 2012).

author: 芳 兰

title: 汉代陶楼的造物研究
Han dai tao lou de zao wu yan jiu
Han dai taolou de zaowu yanjiu
fullText: 芳兰FangLan汉代陶楼的造物研究汉代陶楼的造物研究Han dai tao lou de zao wu yan jiuHan dai taolou de zaowu yanjiuhttps://architecturasinica.org/bibl/7KW2K5REhttps://www.zotero.org/groups/architecturasinica/items/7KW2K5REhttps://www.zotero.org/groups/2267085/items/7KW2K5REWuxi, Jiangsu Province, China2018This dissertation is a research on the creation art of pottery building in the Han Dynasty.Pottery building,a kind of miniature sculpture imitating the real ones,serves as a typical burial object embodying the burial etiquette,social belief,cultural system and handicraft technology during two periods of the Han Dynasty（the Western Han Dynasty,206 BC--AD 24 and the Eastern Han Dynasty,AD 25-220）.It can be seen not only as a materialization of the burial etiquette,but also a reflection of the mindset and technical proficiency of the folk art of the Han Dynasties.Meanwhile,imitating the real building,it serves as the mirror image of realistic architectural shape and technology.This dissertation,with the research on interrelated dynamic field between the shaping,manufacturing and consuming of burial objects,represents the historical context and cultural field of the creation,and reviews the tradition of the object creation of Chinese people under the context that traditional culture has been increasingly highlighted,adopting newly discovered material and new methodology.Firstly,the data on the shape,structure and components of the pottery building in the Han Dynasty have been collected,categorized and confirmed.When it comes to the shape,pottery building takes the form of one door multi-story building,double eave roof building and building complex.By the way,if classified by the function it serves,it can be categorized as warehouse,watchtower,and waterside pavilion.As for the structure of the building,wooden frame structure is the mainstream at that time,and a key element propelled the transformation from the high-platform building during the pre-Qin period（before 221 BC）to the high-rise building during the Han Dynasty,a time witnessed unprecedented development of Chinese traditional architecture in the history.But wood is nearly impossible to stand the test of the weather and time,so wooden frame structure constructed at that time has basically disappeared.What remains to this day are a few stone frame buildings,such as the Zhuwei Stone Chamber1 and Xiaotang Mountain Memorial Temple2 in Shandong Province.Since the beginning of the 20 th century with the rise of Chinese archeology by main means of field investigations and excavations,a wealth of data on building archaeology in Han Dynasty has been obtained.“Pottery building” excavated is the empirical data that we can use to restore history and deduce ancient culture.Secondly,the perspective of ancient art of creation has been employed to probe into the pottery building in the Han Dynasty.Pottery building,if looked as a “design works”,is in the first place the manifestation of the rites,system changes and the will of the rulers with regard to the combination of funerary object in the Han Dynasty,and in the second place the representation of the development of burial culture in terms of the shape,material and specification of the burial objects.It is also the reflection of the dynamic game process of all parties involved in funeral rites including the rulers and the ruled in particular space-time context.Moreover,social etiquette and customs are also reflected in the form of funerary objects through the process of this game.Finally,the origin of the pottery building creation from technology,material and specification has been explored.With social development,the change of belief and the development of pottery technology and a series of changes in the building specification bring about constant richness and popularity of varied types of pottery building from the middle and late period of the Western Han Dynasty to the late Eastern Han Dynasty.Meanwhile,inquiries about inner motives of the transformation of obsequies belief and the types of funerary object in the Han Dynasty have been made from the perspective of social class,social belief and culture.It can be concluded that during the period of the Han Dynasty（either in the Western Han or Eastern Han Dynasty）,new funeral system and etiquette came into being thereupon with social structure changing greatly,and the number of literati and feudal landlords increasing sharply.Burial system transformed from “that in the Zhou Dynasty（1059 BC-771 BC）” to “that in the Han Dynasty”,and the funerary objects in Han Dynasty lost their deity,and in turn gained some humanity,while people’s mindset turned from witchcraft worship to practicability and rationality.Pottery building is the typical representative of funerary objects in this period.The creation of pottery building is based on the concept of “when manufacturing an article or an implement it is necessary to refer to its shape or drawing”.It is a virtual miniature space for the dead,not only the product of social customs change,but also the representation of social status.The studies of this dissertation proceed from specific objects,manage to restore the historical scenario,and do a deep research into the imitative,symbolic and ceremonial features of pottery building creation in the Han Dynasty so as to explore the intrinsic cultural mechanism of folk creation art in its course of development and decline. 兰芳. “汉代陶楼的造物研究.” Doctoral, 江南大学, 2018. 兰芳, 汉代陶楼的造物研究 (Doctoral, 江南大学, 2018).

fullText: 张十庆南方上昂与挑斡作法探析https://architecturasinica.org/bibl/7PRZ3Y7Uhttps://www.zotero.org/groups/architecturasinica/items/7PRZ3Y7Uhttps://www.zotero.org/groups/2267085/items/7PRZ3Y7U建筑史论文集16200231-45+290上昂与挑斡是唐宋以来铺作中的两个构件和作法。二者随时代与地域的不同,在我国南北方表现出相当的差异,宋以后并逐渐演化为江南建筑地方作法。本文希望通过这一探讨,增进对于两宋以来南北建筑的演化以及南方建筑地域特色的认识与理解。 张十庆. “南方上昂与挑斡作法探析.” 建筑史论文集 16, no. 02 (2002): 31-45+290. 张十庆, 南方上昂与挑斡作法探析, 建筑史论文集 16, no. 02 (2002): 31-45+290.

fullText: 轶夫李Yifu韩城文庙建筑研究han cheng wen miao jian zhu yan jiu hancheng wenmiao jianzhu yanjiu https://architecturasinica.org/bibl/7XBKFEMChttps://www.zotero.org/groups/architecturasinica/items/7XBKFEMChttps://www.zotero.org/groups/2267085/items/7XBKFEMC西安2004文庙是中国古代封建王朝奉祀儒家学派创始人孔子和传授儒家文化的建筑。是古代城市营建制度的集中反映，只有县级以上治地才可以修建，并且随着城市等级增高而规模越大。文庙建筑在我国古代与教育结合紧密，也就有了所谓“庙学合一”，这里所指的“庙”为孔庙，“学”为学宫，也就是我国古代官方所办的学校。由于在我国封建社会办学有官学和私学之分，所以我国古代官学和私学学校的教育机制及其称谓有所不同，与孔庙相结合的平面布局型制也有所不同。文庙以主要建筑“大成殿”院落的祭祀空间为核心，与“明伦堂(国子监)”院落的内庭学习空间为次中心所产生的位置关系，组成了内庙为学、前庙后学、左庙右学、右庙左学等文庙的基本型制，创造了不同的院落空间模式。我国各地现存文庙多为明清时期所建地方官学文庙。地方官学文庙建筑平面布局型制大致相同，主要建筑基本为庙前设照壁、棂星门、泮池，庙内有大成门、大成殿、明伦堂、尊经阁等建筑。 韩城文庙为全国重点文物保护单位。韩城现存文庙建筑于明代洪武四年(公元1371年)在金正大年间(公元1224-1231年)所建韩城文庙的旧址上扩建和修葺元代韩城文庙建筑而成。历经明清两代多次修葺而成为目前的规模。文庙位于现韩城市金城区学巷内，南向而距，为进出古城东城门必经之地。韩城文庙建筑对称布局，主次分明，是陕西省保护最完整、规模最大的文庙建筑，具有极高的历史、艺术、科学价值。本论文以韩城文庙为主要研究对象，以儒家文化为背景，对文庙建筑主要是韩城文庙的历史沿革、选址与环境、总体布局、单体建筑、细部特征及总体建筑特征进行了初步的探讨和总结。 李轶夫. “韩城文庙建筑研究.” 硕士, 西安建筑科技大学, 2004. https://tinyurl.com/y62w2f5q. 李轶夫, 韩城文庙建筑研究 (硕士, 西安建筑科技大学, 2004), https://tinyurl.com/y62w2f5q.

fullText: 熹年傅XinianFu唐长安大明宫含元殿原状的探讨唐長安大明宮含元殿原狀的探討Tang changan da ming gong han yuan dian yuan zhuang de tan taoTang Chang'an daminggong hanyuandian yuanzhuang de tantaohttps://architecturasinica.org/bibl/8P83U9PIhttps://www.zotero.org/groups/architecturasinica/items/8P83U9PIhttps://www.zotero.org/groups/2267085/items/8P83U9PI文物文物Wen wuWenwu197330-48<正> 大明宫在唐长安城外,紧靠北城墙东段,原是隋代禁苑的一部分。唐太宗李世民贞观八年(公元634年)就其地建永安宫,次年改名大明宫,准备给太上皇李渊居住。其后约三十年,唐高宗李治再修大明宫,改名蓬莱宫,于龙朔二年(公元662年)自城内旧宫太极宫迁居。因为它在太极宫之东,故称"东内",相应称太极宫为"西内"。含元殿是"东内"中轴线上第一座殿,南对"东内"正门丹风门。它是举行元旦、冬至大朝会和 傅熹年. “唐长安大明宫含元殿原状的探讨.” 文物, no. 07 (1973): 30–48. http://kns.cnki.net/kcms/detail/detail.aspx?dbname=CJFD1979&filename=WENW197307005&dbcode=CJFD. 傅熹年, 唐长安大明宫含元殿原状的探讨, 文物, no. 07 (1973): 30–48, http://kns.cnki.net/kcms/detail/detail.aspx?dbname=CJFD1979&filename=WENW197307005&dbcode=CJFD.

author: Paul W. Kroll
title: A Student's Dictionary of Classical and Medieval Chinese
Handbook of Oriental Studies. Section 4 China ; 30
fullText: Paul W.KrollWilliam G.BoltzDavid R.KnechtgesY. EdmundLienAntjeRichterMatthias L.RichterDing XiangWarnerA Student's Dictionary of Classical and Medieval Chinesehttps://architecturasinica.org/bibl/8RRW96CVhttps://www.zotero.org/groups/architecturasinica/items/8RRW96CVhttps://www.zotero.org/groups/2267085/items/8RRW96CVPaperLeidenBrill2015Handbook of Oriental Studies. Section 4 China ; 30This book is the long-desired Chinese & English reference work for all those reading texts dating from the Warring States period through the Tang dynasty. Comprising 8,000+ characters, arranged alphabetically by Pinyin. As a lexicon meant for practical use, it immensely facilitates reading and translating historical, literary, and religious texts dating from approximately 500 BCE to 1000 CE. Being primarily a dictionary of individual characters and the words they represent, it also includes an abundance of alliterative and echoic binomes as well as accurate identifications of hundreds of plants, animals, and assorted technical terms in various fields. It aims to become the English-language resource of choice for all those seeking assistance in reading texts dating from the Warring States period through the Tang dynasty. Previous Chinese-English dictionaries have persistently mixed together without clarification all eras and styles of Chinese. But written Chinese in its 3,000 year history has changed and evolved even more than English has in its mere millennium, with classical and medieval Chinese differing more from modern standard Chinese than the language of Beowulf; or even that of Chaucer differs from modern English. Kroll, Paul W. A Student’s Dictionary of Classical and Medieval Chinese. Paper. Handbook of Oriental Studies. Section 4 China ; 30. Leiden: Brill, 2015. http://www.worldcat.org/oclc/898043208. keyword: The Paradox of the Angled Bracket-arm and the Unorthodox “Speech Patterns” of Shanxi Regional Architecture
author: Alexandra Harrer
title: The Paradox of the Angled Bracket-arm and the Unorthodox “Speech Patterns” of Shanxi Regional Architecture
Sino-Platonic Papers
fullText: AlexandraHarrerThe Paradox of the Angled Bracket-arm and the Unorthodox “Speech Patterns” of Shanxi Regional Architecturehttps://architecturasinica.org/bibl/9ACICTX4https://www.zotero.org/groups/architecturasinica/items/9ACICTX4https://www.zotero.org/groups/2267085/items/9ACICTX4Sino-Platonic Papers20181-42This paper challenges the traditional view of Chinese architecture as a building culture rooted solely in the idea of orthogonality (straightness, squareness) and the desire for normalization (regularity through conformity with government rules). After discussing if and how historical documents and/or their modern interpretation have codified these principles and created an official language for wood construction, the author identifies Shanxi regional architecture as a topolect, a traditional Chinese linguistic concept that identifies a local form of speech that is mutually intelligible with Standard Chinese (Mandarin). Just as with Chinese language, Chinese architecture took various forms that had shared characteristics with the mainstream form, but that varied just as topolects do, Besides taking on a local flavor in the form of dialects, “Shanxi Mandarin,” as we might call it, shared a common set of “grammar” rules with the official “tongue” but modified its “vocabulary,” and this included using unorthodox (slanting, sloping, curved) elements such as the angled bracket-arm. Making use of the analogy with Chinese language, this paper uses recent linguistic and architectural research to re-contextualize the linguistic metaphor that has been the basis of the formulation of Western architectural theory for the past two millennia and to elaborate on early-twentieth-century Chinese explanatory models (e.g., those of Liang Sicheng). This in turn proves helpful for explaining the (hitherto unsolved) complex relationship between the standard and its regional and local variations in the rhetoric of Chinese construction, and offers an alternative way of interpretation that eschews the negative connotation of socio-political caste mentality (native Han vs. alien, non-Han ethnicity). Harrer, Alexandra. “The Paradox of the Angled Bracket-Arm and the Unorthodox ‘Speech Patterns’ of Shanxi Regional Architecture.” Sino-Platonic Papers, 2018, 1–42. Alexandra Harrer, The Paradox of the Angled Bracket-Arm and the Unorthodox ‘Speech Patterns’ of Shanxi Regional Architecture, Sino-Platonic Papers, 2018, 1–42.

fullText: 鴻勛楊HongxunYang唐長安慈恩寺大雁塔初創形制破解唐長安慈恩寺大雁塔初創形制破解Tang Chang'an Ci en si Da yan ta chu chuang xing zhi po jieTang Changan Ci'ensi Dayanta chuchuang xingzhi pojiehttps://architecturasinica.org/bibl/9MZGZAHXhttps://www.zotero.org/groups/architecturasinica/items/9MZGZAHXhttps://www.zotero.org/groups/2267085/items/9MZGZAHX城市與設計學報城市與設計學報Cheng shi yu she ji xue baoChengshi yu sheji xuebao20071 - 10西安市現存的慈恩寺大雁塔被導遊者解說為“唐代建築”，但是由於它經過明代大修，已面目全非，所以在《中國古代建築史》中不予收錄。歷來建築史家認為唐初創時的大雁塔形制已無從知曉，所以此塔原狀就成了千古之謎。 其實，唐代玄奘法師到印度取經歸來、經皇帝批准在長安慈恩寺按照他帶回的圖樣建造的大雁塔，其所本的原形－佛陀迦耶精舍，在玄奘所著《大唐西域記》中是有記載的。印度現存的這座塔也是經過大修而改變了面貌的，如果知道玄奘當時所看到的佛陀迦耶精舍的式樣，將它與現存大雁塔對照考察，則初創時的真相就可大白於天下了。經過多年的查找，終於找到了印度佛陀迦耶精舍原狀的材料。於是不但破解了大雁塔初創形制之謎，而且考證出武則天時改建的式樣以及晚唐維修後的式樣。從而澄清了“大雁塔曾經推倒重建”的說法。 楊鴻勛. “唐長安慈恩寺大雁塔初創形制破解.” 城市與設計學報, no. 18 (2007): 1–10. 楊鴻勛, 唐長安慈恩寺大雁塔初創形制破解, 城市與設計學報, no. 18 (2007): 1–10.

keyword: The Buddhist caves at Qixiashan, China (Southern Dynasties, 420-589 CE)
author: Wei Lin
title: The Buddhist caves at Qixiashan, China (Southern Dynasties, 420-589 CE)
fullText: WeiLinThe Buddhist caves at Qixiashan, China (Southern Dynasties, 420-589 CE)https://architecturasinica.org/bibl/9UYNL8GQhttps://www.zotero.org/groups/architecturasinica/items/9UYNL8GQhttps://www.zotero.org/groups/2267085/items/9UYNL8GQhttp://www.worldcat.org/oclc/166145116Columbus, OhioOhio State University2007Abstract: This study examines the Southern Dynasties (420-589 CE) Buddhist caves at Qixiashan, located in the Nanjing region of Jiangsu province in China. They are by far the earliest and, despite their poor condition, the better preserved examples of the few rock-cut remains in the south during the Six Dynasties period (220-589 CE). In addition, this imperially sponsored cave site is located at the ancient capital of the Southern Dynasties; thus, the Buddhist monuments at Qixia provide important physical evidence of the mainstream southern Buddhist art of that time. However, due to an unfortunate cement coating of images during an ill-advised 1925 "restoration," it has been very difficult to conduct scholarly research on this site until the late 1990s, when the cement was removed. My principal research data are based on field research, particularly the detailed photographic documentation of these newly-restored caves and drawings collected in my original fieldwork. In addition, my research method also includes translating a large body of primary literature related to the caves and their excavation. This study provides the first thorough visual documentation and art historical analysis of the Qixia caves. The chronological analysis proposes three stages of artistic development at Qixia: the first period dated to the late fifth century of the Southern Qi dynasty; the second and third period dated to the earlier and later part of the Southern Liang dynasty, respectively. A closer examination of the site's iconography within the historical context further reveals the popularity of the Amitayus and Maitreya Pure Lands during the Southern Dynasties period. A contextual study also informs us that, while borrowing northern conventions, Qixia has developed a unique southern style in cave art and architecture. This new southern tradition in turn provided models for the Buddhist caves during the later part of the Northern dynasties around the end of the fifth to sixth century. Given the fact that late fifth and sixth century witnessed the domestication of Buddhism in China, this study further signifies the role and contribution of southern China in the internalization of Buddhism and Buddhist art during that period Lin, Wei. The Buddhist Caves at Qixiashan, China (Southern Dynasties, 420-589 CE). Columbus, Ohio: Ohio State University, 2007. http://rave.ohiolink.edu/etdc/view?acc_num=osu1181919094. Wei Lin, The Buddhist Caves at Qixiashan, China (Southern Dynasties, 420-589 CE) (Columbus, Ohio: Ohio State University, 2007), http://rave.ohiolink.edu/etdc/view?acc_num=osu1181919094.

fullText: AlexandraHarrerFan-Shaped Bracket Sets and Their Application in Religious Timber Architecture of Shanxi Provincehttps://architecturasinica.org/bibl/A8WEWJG5https://www.zotero.org/groups/architecturasinica/items/A8WEWJG5https://www.zotero.org/groups/2267085/items/A8WEWJG52010The dissertation challenges one of the most distinctive features in traditional Chinese architecture, the bracket set known as dougong 斗栱, and discusses diverging stylistic variations that actually existed in Shanxi province 山西省 between the eleventh and nineteenth centuries against the background of official-style building. The key challenge was to see beyond the long lasting stereotypes in China that did not allow full acknowledgement of the wide range of corbelled clusters with bracket-arms projecting at acute or obtuse angles to the wall plane i.e. xiegong 斜栱, and the importance of such non-conformity. The scope of research was limited to the extant pool of timber structures in Shanxi officially designated as key national heritage conservation units between 1961 and 2006. Through visual and textual study and especially through on-site field work the author collected quantitative and qualitative data with regard to the possible containment of fan-shaped bracket sets, hereafter named shanshi dougong 扇式斗栱, and the tightly spaced, grid-like scepter bracketing known as ruyi dougong 如意斗栱. As a result, the thesis formulates the necessary nomenclature and appropriate methodology along with proper guidelines for discussing the rich pool of xiegong-architecture in the future. With special emphasis on the Jindongnan area in southeast Shanxi, it proves the highly flexible, underlying concept of yielding to different regional and local construction methods, and to environmental and economical conditions. Harrer, Alexandra. “Fan-Shaped Bracket Sets and Their Application in Religious Timber Architecture of Shanxi Province.” University of Pennsylvania, 2010. Alexandra Harrer, Fan-Shaped Bracket Sets and Their Application in Religious Timber Architecture of Shanxi Province (University of Pennsylvania, 2010).

fullText: 思成梁SichengLiang记五台山佛光寺的建筑——荟萃在一寺的魏、齐、唐、宋的四个孤例;荟萃在一殿的唐代四种艺术記五台山佛光寺的建築——薈萃在一寺的魏、齊、唐、宋的四個孤例；薈萃在一殿的唐代四種藝術Ji wu tai shan fo guang si de jian zhu--hui cui zai yi si de wei qi tang song de si ge gu li; hui cui zai yi dian de tang dai si zhong yi shuJi wutaishan foguangsi de jianzhu-- huicui zai yi si de wei qi tang song de sige guli; huicui zai yi dian de tangdai sizhong yishuhttps://architecturasinica.org/bibl/A9FZEL79https://www.zotero.org/groups/architecturasinica/items/A9FZEL79https://www.zotero.org/groups/2267085/items/A9FZEL79文物文物Wen wuWenwu195376-89+91+93-121中央文化部爲了堅决執行保護古文物建築政策,兩年來,曾協同各地方人民政府,對散佈在全國各地的古建築逐步地作了勘察,並在有計劃的對具有重大價值的古建築進行重點修繕。山西五台山佛光寺大殿是唐代遺構,距今有一千○九十餘年的歷史,它是國內僅存的、已經調查過的唯一唐代木構建築。解放後,人民政府對它的現存狀况極為關心,在一九五○年七月,中央文化部文物局(現改爲‘社會文化事業管理局’)組織的雁北文物勘察團,對佛光寺即曾做了極詳細的調查,並且已在去年六月就開始了重點修繕。佛光寺是一九三七年為梁思成先生等所發現,關於寺的狀况、曆史與建築藝術,曾撰文登載‘中國營造學社彙刊’第七卷第一、二期。因該期印數不多,现已不易得到。為了供給各地文物工作者研究古建築的參考,本刊特請梁先生將原文加以修改,再在本刊發表。 梁思成. “记五台山佛光寺的建筑——荟萃在一寺的魏、齐、唐、宋的四个孤例;荟萃在一殿的唐代四种艺术.” 文物, no. 第C1期 (1953): 76-89+91+93-121. 梁思成, 记五台山佛光寺的建筑——荟萃在一寺的魏、齐、唐、宋的四个孤例;荟萃在一殿的唐代四种艺术, 文物, no. 第C1期 (1953): 76-89+91+93-121.

Sinica Leidensia, v. 75
fullText: JinhuaChenPhilosopher, practitioner, politician [electronic resource] : the many lives of Fazang (643-712)https://architecturasinica.org/bibl/AQUQVPANhttps://www.zotero.org/groups/architecturasinica/items/AQUQVPANhttps://www.zotero.org/groups/2267085/items/AQUQVPANLeiden, The Netherlands ;Brill2007Sinica Leidensia, v. 75The Buddhist monk Fazang (643-712), regarded today mainly as a scholastic monk, was in fact one of the greatest metaphysicians in Asia. This biographical - and hagiographical - study of Fazang seeks to explore his other contributions and in so doing to correct some major mis-presentations and misinterpretations existing in modern scholarship. It highlights and uncovers aspects of Fazang’s complicated life which have been neglected or ignored until now. By experimenting with some methodological innovations in reading medieval Chinese monastic hagio-biography, this study reveals general features, structures and overall governing laws of medieval East Asian monastic hagio-biographic literature. In doing so it is a major contribution to the ongoing discussion among scholars of hagiography in other contexts as well. Chen, Jinhua. Philosopher, Practitioner, Politician [Electronic Resource] : The Many Lives of Fazang (643-712). Sinica Leidensia, v. 75. Leiden, The Netherlands ; Brill, 2007. http://www.worldcat.org/oclc/907175066. fullText: 琳林LinLin日本禅宗样建筑所见的《营造法式》中“挑斡”与“昂程”及其相关构件——兼论其与中国江南建筑关系日本禪宗樣建築所見的《營造法式》中“挑斡”与“昂程”及其相關構件——兼論其與中國江南建築關係Riben chan zong yang jian zhu suo jian de ying zao fa shi zhong tiao wo yu ang ting ji qi xiang guan gou jian jian lun qi yu zhongguo jiang nan jian zhu guan xiRiben chanzongyang jianzhu suojian de yingzaofashi zhong tiaowo yu angting jiqi xiangguan goujian jianlun qi yu zhongguo jiangnan jianzhu guanxihttps://architecturasinica.org/bibl/ATZ2HIXHhttps://www.zotero.org/groups/architecturasinica/items/ATZ2HIXHhttps://www.zotero.org/groups/2267085/items/ATZ2HIXH建筑史建築史Jian zhu shiJianzhushi2017214-230"挑斡"与"上昂"及其相关概念辨析,曾是《营造法式》(以下简称《法式》)研究中悬而未决的问题。问题的症结在《营造法式》中一个关键概念"昂桯",长期存疑。近期有学者撰文厘清了"昂桯"等相关概念,使问题趋于明朗。本文在此基础上,聚焦于禅宗样建筑,整理了《法式》及实际应用中涉及的多个斜向构件的定义及使用方法,厘清相互间关系。进一步,以这些概念为基础,对日本中世禅宗样建筑铺作中的斜向构件做法进行分析与分类,并结合中国宋元的江南建筑实例,讨论这些斜向构件的做法在中日的传播。 林琳. “日本禅宗样建筑所见的《营造法式》中‘挑斡’与‘昂程’及其相关构件——兼论其与中国江南建筑关系.” 建筑史, no. 02 (2017): 214–30. 林琳, 日本禅宗样建筑所见的《营造法式》中‘挑斡’与‘昂程’及其相关构件——兼论其与中国江南建筑关系, 建筑史, no. 02 (2017): 214–30.

fullText: 翔宇刘XiangyuLiu大同华严寺及薄伽教藏殿建筑研究大同華嚴寺及薄伽教藏殿建築研究Datong hua yan si ji bo jia jiao zang dian jian zhu yan jiuDatong Huayan si ji bojia jiaozang dian jianzhu yanjiuhttps://architecturasinica.org/bibl/AVN8WDS4https://www.zotero.org/groups/architecturasinica/items/AVN8WDS4https://www.zotero.org/groups/2267085/items/AVN8WDS42015不乏杰出案例的辽代建筑，是我国现存古代建筑中不可忽视的组成部分，对辽代建筑所做的研究对理解唐宋变革时期的建筑有着至关重要的作用，也是探寻中古时期建筑设计规律、建筑文化现象，以及建筑背后所折射的宗教思想的关键。<br> 本文以学界对辽代建筑已有的高水平研究为基础，聚焦于相对被前人所忽视却极为重要的大同华严寺以及薄伽教藏殿，在辽代建筑整体及辽代多元社会文化背景的视角下所做的个案综合研究。<br> 论文首先对华严寺自辽代创立以来至今的各时期兴衰过程及缘由展开了详细的论述，尤其重新发掘了华严寺之于辽代政权及国家宗教文化的重要性。另一方面，考察其作为研究对象，在学术史各阶段中所扮演的不同角色与价值。进而以薄伽教藏殿目前最为详实的调查报告为支撑，在分析辽代建筑形象总体发展进程以及对辽代建筑中一种具有特殊含义的装饰手段的探寻中，理解薄伽教藏殿的外部形象，随即对其在当时佛教观念影响下形成的完整内部宗教空间设计进行解读。 刘翔宇. “大同华严寺及薄伽教藏殿建筑研究.” 天津大学, 2015. 刘翔宇, 大同华严寺及薄伽教藏殿建筑研究 (天津大学, 2015).

fullText: 薇陈WeiChen历史如此流动——金陵大报恩寺遗址公园规划设计歷史如此流動——金陵大報恩寺遺址公園規劃設計Li shi ru ci liu dong--jinling da bao en si yi zhi gong yuan gui hua she jiLishi ruci liudong--jinling dabao'ensi yizhi gongyuan guihua shejihttps://architecturasinica.org/bibl/AZ2HDNYIhttps://www.zotero.org/groups/architecturasinica/items/AZ2HDNYIhttps://www.zotero.org/groups/2267085/items/AZ2HDNYI建筑学报建築學報 Jian zhu xue bao Jianzhu xuebao2017.011-7明成祖朱棣赐建的南京大报恩寺，曾经是规模恢弘的佛教圣地，其中的琉璃宝塔，被西方学者视为中世纪世界七 大奇迹之一。然而，寺庙和宝塔最终难逃太平天国的兵燹，均遭毁圮。近年来，经屡次的考古发掘，不仅廓清了主要建筑 和塔殿院落的基本格局，更由于佛顶骨舍利与诸圣舍利惊现于地宫之中，使得这所明代皇家寺庙重回公众的视线。南京市 政府因其具有重要的历史、文化、艺术和科学价值，决定规划建设大报恩寺遗址公园。 由东南大学组成的城市设计、建筑历史、遗产保护、建筑设计等多学科紧密合作的项目设计团队，承接了这一传承历 史文化的重要项目，前后经历 12 年，于 2015 年 12 月正式开园一期工程。 在本期关注中，陈薇教授以侧记的方式，展现了历史研究作为重要的一环，始终贯穿在该项目的推进过程中，同时， 对遗产保护与历史文化传承所涉及的诸多问题，在文中也作了相应的讨论，并由此提出了严格保护、叠合历史、衔接现状、 科学发展的宽广思路 ;王建国教授的论文阐述了在城市设计层面，该项目如何通过城市历史功能结构的整合和城市肌理的 延续，重塑大报恩寺的历史情景，最终达到凸显场地价值、呼应历史文脉、提升城市品质的阶段性目标 ;韩冬青教授的论 文则侧重于遗址如何在得到严格且有效保护的前提下，通过设计的手段，再现大报恩寺的基本格局，并恰当地呈现遗址本 体的信息，同时满足现代博物馆的多元功能，文中且以较多的笔墨，讲述了新塔的设计理念和技术措施，以及外墙材料的 历史象征意义。 2016 年，本刊与东南大学设计院联合组织了程泰宁、崔恺、孟建民等多位专家学者，参观并研讨了该项目，大家认为， 该项目的建成，为遗址类公园和博物馆如何平衡严格的遗址保护以及价值认知与激活当代城市生活之间的关系，提供了一 种新的可能策略。 陈薇. “历史如此流动——金陵大报恩寺遗址公园规划设计.” 建筑学报, January 2017, 1–7. 陈薇, 历史如此流动——金陵大报恩寺遗址公园规划设计, 建筑学报, January 2017, 1–7.

fullText: 熹年傅XinianFu关于“展子虔《游春图》”年代的探讨Guan yu zhan zi qian "You chun tu" nian dai de tan taoGuanyu zhan ziqian "Youchuntu" niandai de tantaohttps://architecturasinica.org/bibl/BC62RLYYhttps://www.zotero.org/groups/architecturasinica/items/BC62RLYYhttps://www.zotero.org/groups/2267085/items/BC62RLYY文物197840-52<正> 故宫博物院藏"展子虔《游春图》"是数百年来颇负盛名的一幅古代绘画,著录于元周密《云烟过眼录》、明文嘉《严氏书画记》、詹景凤《玄览编》、张丑《清河书画舫》、清吴升《大观录》、安岐《墨缘汇观》和《石渠宝笈续编》等重要书画著录书籍中。在画前隔水上有宋赵佶(徽宗)題"展子虔游春图"六字。八百年来这幅画历经宋赵佶、贾似道,元仁宗鲁国大长公主祥哥刺吉,明严嵩、严世蕃父子、韩世能、韩朝延父子,清安岐、弘历(乾隆帝)等人递藏。用 傅熹年. “关于‘展子虔《游春图》’年代的探讨.” 文物, no. 11 (1978): 40–52. http://kns.cnki.net/kns/detail/detail.aspx?FileName=WENW197811005&DbName=CJFQ1979. 傅熹年, 关于‘展子虔《游春图》’年代的探讨, 文物, no. 11 (1978): 40–52, http://kns.cnki.net/kns/detail/detail.aspx?FileName=WENW197811005&DbName=CJFQ1979.

fullText: DenisTwitchettMichaelLoeweThe Cambridge History of China: Volume 1: The Ch'in and Han Empires, 221 BC–AD 220https://architecturasinica.org/bibl/BJCR3WAChttps://www.zotero.org/groups/architecturasinica/items/BJCR3WAChttps://www.zotero.org/groups/2267085/items/BJCR3WAC1CambridgeCambridge University Press1986The Cambridge History of ChinaThis volume begins the historical coverage of The Cambridge History of China with the establishment of the Ch'in empire in 221 BC and ends with the abdication of the last Han emperor in AD 220. Spanning four centuries, this period witnessed major evolutionary changes in almost every aspect of China's development, being particularly notable for the emergence and growth of a centralized administration and imperial government. Leading historians from Asia, Europe, and America have contributed chapters that convey a realistic impression of significant political, economic, intellectual, religious, and social developments, and of the contacts that the Chinese made with other peoples at this time. As the book is intended for the general reader as well as the specialist, technical details are given in both Chinese terms and English equivalents. References lead to primary sources and their translations and to secondary writings in European languages as well as Chinese and Japanese. Twitchett, Denis, and Michael Loewe, eds. The Cambridge History of China: Volume 1: The Ch’in and Han Empires, 221 BC–AD 220. Vol. 1. The Cambridge History of China. Cambridge: Cambridge University Press, 1986. https://doi.org/10.1017/CHOL9780521243278. fullText: 畅刘ChangLiu端详钦安殿的溜金斗栱端詳欽安殿的溜金斗栱Duan xiang qin an dian de liu jin dou gongDuanxiang qin'an dian de liujin dougonghttps://architecturasinica.org/bibl/C2ZI6C8Vhttps://www.zotero.org/groups/architecturasinica/items/C2ZI6C8Vhttps://www.zotero.org/groups/2267085/items/C2ZI6C8V紫禁城紫禁城Zi jin chengZijincheng2015201547-53循道教之道,建一座木结构的殿堂,或许比在那遥远山巅上修建熠熠生辉的金殿更具超脱凡尘的心境。只不过帝王的心中终究是凡尘,因此殿堂要有殿堂的规格,斗栱要有斗栱的制度,彩画要有彩画的等级,石雕要有石雕的主题。理解规格制度,靠的是见识。把御花园中的钦安殿拿来与众多明初的敕建道教 刘畅. “端详钦安殿的溜金斗栱.” 紫禁城 2015, no. 5 (2015): 47–53. 刘畅, 端详钦安殿的溜金斗栱, 紫禁城 2015, no. 5 (2015): 47–53.

fullText: 怡涛徐YitaoXu“抄”、“杪”辨“抄”、“杪”辨Chao, miao bianChao, miao bianhttps://architecturasinica.org/bibl/C5ESIUDPhttps://www.zotero.org/groups/architecturasinica/items/C5ESIUDPhttps://www.zotero.org/groups/2267085/items/C5ESIUDP建筑史论文集17200330-39+274-275本文梳理了《营造法式》中华棋的别称是"杪"栱抑或是"抄"棋的争议,通过对汉、唐、宋相关字义的论证,并援引《营造法式》和有关史料,指出:"杪"拱很可能是宋以前的称谓,而"抄"是"杪"的语讹,但这个语讹产生在《营造法式》编修之前。根据古建构件名称演变的历史规律,笔者认为今"杪"、"抄"皆可成立。 徐怡涛. “‘抄’、‘杪’辨.” 建筑史论文集 17, no. 01 (2003): 30-39+274-275. 徐怡涛, ‘抄’、‘杪’辨, 建筑史论文集 17, no. 01 (2003): 30-39+274-275.

fullText: 晓露陈从印度栏楯到犍陀罗列龛：一个佛塔装饰元素的考察https://architecturasinica.org/bibl/C5GZPE6Ahttps://www.zotero.org/groups/architecturasinica/items/C5GZPE6Ahttps://www.zotero.org/groups/2267085/items/C5GZPE6A美术研究202367-72栏楯本是早期佛塔不可或缺的组成部分，兼具功能性与装饰性。随着佛塔的演变，栏楯逐渐成为佛塔表面的装饰图案，并在犍陀罗为壁柱、列龛所取代，后者承载内容也从叙事性佛传故事逐渐过渡到宗教性浓厚的偶像，反映了信徒礼拜需求的增加与佛教自身的发展。 陈晓露. “从印度栏楯到犍陀罗列龛：一个佛塔装饰元素的考察.” 美术研究, no. 6 (2023): 67–72. https://doi.org/10.13318/j.cnki.msyj.2023.06.009. 陈晓露, 从印度栏楯到犍陀罗列龛：一个佛塔装饰元素的考察, 美术研究, no. 6 (2023): 67–72, https://doi.org/10.13318/j.cnki.msyj.2023.06.009.

發現獨樂寺

fullText: 垚丁YaoDing发现独乐寺發現獨樂寺fa xian du le sifaxian dulesihttps://architecturasinica.org/bibl/CFPUZ3UXhttps://www.zotero.org/groups/architecturasinica/items/CFPUZ3UXhttps://www.zotero.org/groups/2267085/items/CFPUZ3UX建筑学报建築學報 jian zhu xue baojianzhu xuebao20131-9梁思成1952年发表的《蓟县独乐寺观音阁山门考》是“发现独乐寺”的标志，也是中国建筑学术史上的里程碑。尽管考察的契机缘于关野贞此前的偶遇，但梁思成的研究并未局限于辽代建筑的视野，而是致力于隋唐以来的整个中国建筑史的架构。这一研究有相当复杂的学术脉络，不仅根植于“巴黎美术学院—宾大”的建筑学知识体系，而且直接受到东西方不同背景学者的影响，还大量使用了中国传统的建筑术语．并以古雅的汉语写作。这一研究的实质是西方学术的一种“中国化“，如果拓展到更宏观的视野是中国的“现代化”的表现。“发现独乐寺”作为包含一系列历史事件的复杂集合，则是中国今天仍在持续的“现代化”这一历史进程的缩影。 丁垚. “发现独乐寺.” 建筑学报, no. 5 (2013): 1–9. http://caod.oriprobe.com.proxy.library.vanderbilt.edu/orders/202103061424483101471.htm. 丁垚, 发现独乐寺, 建筑学报, no. 5 (2013): 1–9, http://caod.oriprobe.com.proxy.library.vanderbilt.edu/orders/202103061424483101471.htm.

fullText: 梦哲喻MengzheYu论耍头拟昂现象与六铺作的缺失——以晋东南地区为例論耍頭擬昂現象與六鋪作的缺失——以晉東南地區為例Lun shua tou ni ang xian xiang yu liu pu zuo de que shi--yi jin dong nan di qu wei liLun shuatou niang xianxiang yu liupuzuo de queshi--yi jindongnan diqu weilihttps://architecturasinica.org/bibl/DLZWECR5https://www.zotero.org/groups/architecturasinica/items/DLZWECR5https://www.zotero.org/groups/2267085/items/DLZWECR5建筑学报建築學報Jian zhu xue baoJianzhu xuebao2017110-115耍头自产生伊始,最先模拟下昂昂尖的形态,其后随着梁架与铺作节点的改变,逐渐缩短并丧失结构功能;同时,在使用昂形耍头的木构中六铺作斗栱亦集体缺失。本文从构造做法和外观形象两条线索出发,以遗存数量丰富且时代接续的晋东南地区为例,诠释耍头拟昂与弃用六铺作两种现象间的内在关联,以期揭示构件选型与构造节点设计间的连带性问题。 喻梦哲. “论耍头拟昂现象与六铺作的缺失——以晋东南地区为例.” 建筑学报, no. 11 (2017): 110–15. 喻梦哲, 论耍头拟昂现象与六铺作的缺失——以晋东南地区为例, 建筑学报, no. 11 (2017): 110–15.

keyword: Performing center in a vertical rise: Multilevel pagodas in China's middle period
Regents of the University of Michigan, The Smithsonian Institution
author: Wei-Cheng Lin
title: Performing center in a vertical rise: Multilevel pagodas in China's middle period
Ars Orientalis
publisher: Regents of the University of Michigan, The Smithsonian Institution
fullText: Wei-ChengLinPerforming center in a vertical rise: Multilevel pagodas in China's middle periodhttps://architecturasinica.org/bibl/EGGYVYY5https://www.zotero.org/groups/architecturasinica/items/EGGYVYY5https://www.zotero.org/groups/2267085/items/EGGYVYY5Ars Orientalis46Regents of the University of Michigan, The Smithsonian Institution2016100-134An unprecedented number of multilevel pagodas were built in China from the tenth through the thirteenth century. This growing emphasis on verticality, in contrast to the usual horizontal sprawl of China's building tradition, raises questions about what "height" meant in the history of Chinese architecture. This essay argues that the height of the multilevel pagoda was necessarily performative—not so much because the pagoda served as a means of ascending to that height, but because it drew the attention of the faithful. Its levels, centrality, and indeed, height are architectural components that were key to its performativity, through which its religious significance was revealed and its ritual efficacy enacted. Ultimately, we should see the multilevel pagoda as a structured mechanism, or a performing center in a vertical rise, that prompted the faithful to ascend and to circumambulate around the pagoda, from the periphery to the center, if only conceptually. Lin, Wei-Cheng. “Performing Center in a Vertical Rise: Multilevel Pagodas in China’s Middle Period.” Ars Orientalis 46 (2016): 100–134. http://www.jstor.org/stable/26350433. Wei-Cheng Lin, Performing Center in a Vertical Rise: Multilevel Pagodas in China’s Middle Period, Ars Orientalis 46 (2016): 100–134, http://www.jstor.org/stable/26350433.

fullText: 天挺郑TiantingZheng中国历史大辞典中國歷史大辭典Zhong guo li shi da ci dianZhongguo lishi dacidianhttps://architecturasinica.org/bibl/EIP699JQhttps://www.zotero.org/groups/architecturasinica/items/EIP699JQhttps://www.zotero.org/groups/2267085/items/EIP699JQ第一版上海市上海辞书出版社2007《中国历史大辞典(套装共6册)》包含了五千年中华文明的基本内容，全面准确地反映出中国历史的概貌。《中国历史大辞典(套装共6册)》收词近7万条，902万字，涵括了中国古代政治史、经济史、军事史、思想史、文化史、教育史、法制史、科技史、民族史、风俗史、宗教史、外交史等各个领域，依据历史朝代和专门领域分为先秦、秦汉、魏晋南北朝、隋唐五代、宋、辽夏金元、明、清（上、下）和民族史、历史地理、思想史、史学史、科技史等十四卷。全面发掘和整理了中华民族的历史遗产，反映和总结了以往中国历史学科的重要研究成果，传播和弘扬了中国泱泱古国的历史文明，堪称当今世界上最全面、最权威的中国历史百科全书。 郑天挺, ed. 中国历史大辞典. 第一版. 上海市: 上海辞书出版社, 2007. 郑天挺, ed., 中国历史大辞典, 第一版 (上海市: 上海辞书出版社, 2007).

fullText: 永春朱YongchunZhu 关于《营造法式》中殿堂、厅堂与余屋几个问题的思辨關於《營造法式》中殿堂、廳堂與余屋幾個問題的思辨Guan yu "ying zao fa shi" zhong dian tang ting tang yu yu wu ji ge wen ti de si bianGuanyu "yingzaofashi" zhong diantang tingtang yu yuwu jige wenti de sibianhttps://architecturasinica.org/bibl/F55IH8VEhttps://www.zotero.org/groups/architecturasinica/items/F55IH8VEhttps://www.zotero.org/groups/2267085/items/F55IH8VE建筑史201682-89殿堂、厅堂是宋《营造法式》中同时涉及建筑类型与结构类型的一组概念。文章对其存疑的四个问题加以辨析,指出:(1)"余屋"并非一种独立的建筑类型;(2)《营造法式》中的图,根据其欲图释的问题,有所取舍。"举折屋舍分数"图不是厅堂结构的一种类型图;(3)厅堂大木结构的"间缝内用梁柱"图,反映了厅堂结构横断面的可变性;(4)《营造法式》中的建筑类型,与其结构类型未必同一。 朱永春. “关于《营造法式》中殿堂、厅堂与余屋几个问题的思辨.” 建筑史, no. 02 (2016): 82–89. https://kns.cnki.net/KCMS/detail/detail.aspx?dbcode=CCJD&dbname=CCJDLAST2&filename=JNZS201602007&v=MDEwMTdMdkJMeVBSZmJHNEg5Zk1yWTlGWTRSOGVYMUx1eFlTN0RoMVQzcVRyV00xRnJDVVI3cWZZdVJtRnlyZ1U=. 朱永春, 关于《营造法式》中殿堂、厅堂与余屋几个问题的思辨, 建筑史, no. 02 (2016): 82–89, https://kns.cnki.net/KCMS/detail/detail.aspx?dbcode=CCJD&dbname=CCJDLAST2&filename=JNZS201602007&v=MDEwMTdMdkJMeVBSZmJHNEg5Zk1yWTlGWTRSOGVYMUx1eFlTN0RoMVQzcVRyV00xRnJDVVI3cWZZdVJtRnlyZ1U=.

fullText: 洪波贾HongboJia关于宋式建筑几个大木构件问题的探讨關於宋式建築幾個大木構件問題的探討Guan yu song shi jian zhu ji ge da mu gou jian wen ti de tan taoGuyuan songshi jianzh jige damu goujian wenti de tantaohttps://architecturasinica.org/bibl/FAJ6HHYJhttps://www.zotero.org/groups/architecturasinica/items/FAJ6HHYJhttps://www.zotero.org/groups/2267085/items/FAJ6HHYJ故宫博物院院刊故宮博物院院刊Gu gong bo wu yuan yuan kanGugong bowuyuan yuan kan201091-109+158有若干宋式建筑大木构件,《营造法式》记载失之太过简略或语焉不清,与现存宋元建筑实例难以完全契合,致使当今学术界存有不同的认识与理解。本文结合建筑实例,对几个大木构件构造问题略作考察分析,认为:隐角梁与续角梁是一物而二名;挑斡于《法式》原意可能是指铺作中昂之后尾与梁架的结合方式而言,即凡具有昂尾挑一斗或一材两栔以承下平槫的构造形式就可以称为挑斡,而不论其是否出昂头,宋元实例所见下昂、上昂及所谓斜撑一类构件的做法灵活多样,很难就此总结出与当今各家所谓挑斡完全契合的固定模式;假昂最初就是在无法用真昂的地方从外观形式上对真昂的模仿,其最早大约可追溯至中晚唐时期,而在宋辽金时期也存在诸如平出昂、插昂、昂形耍头等多种形式的具有假昂意味的做法,它们结合起来一并导致了成熟的假昂形态,较为正规的假昂做法至少在北宋前期已存在;牛脊槫的位置应在铺作的正心槽缝亦即檐柱头缝上,大致相当于清式的正心桁。 贾洪波. “关于宋式建筑几个大木构件问题的探讨.” 故宫博物院院刊, no. 03 (2010): 91-109+158. http://kns.cnki.net/kns/detail/detail.aspx?FileName=GGBW201003012&DbName=CJFQ2010. 贾洪波, 关于宋式建筑几个大木构件问题的探讨, 故宫博物院院刊, no. 03 (2010): 91-109+158, http://kns.cnki.net/kns/detail/detail.aspx?FileName=GGBW201003012&DbName=CJFQ2010.

author: Nancy Shatzman Steinhardt
title: Liao Architecture
fullText: Nancy ShatzmanSteinhardtLiao Architecturehttps://architecturasinica.org/bibl/FAT47S42https://www.zotero.org/groups/architecturasinica/items/FAT47S42https://www.zotero.org/groups/2267085/items/FAT47S42University of Hawaii Press1997Liao Architecture is a study of Buddhist halls, tombs, and pagodas built primarily through the patronage of Northeast Asian lords of Qidan nationality from the mid-tenth through the first decades of the twelfth century. During those years, North China was part of a larger Qidan empire known as the Liao dynasty. The Qidan, in the ninth century, were a seminomadic tribe living along China's northern and northeastern borders. Less than fifty years later, by the early years of the tenth century, they and other North Asia groups were confederated under the leadership of a Qidan chieftain named Abaoji. In 947 Abaoji's son established a Chinese-style dynasty named Liao. Liao territory stretched from the Gobi Desert, across Mongolia, into China's Northeast provinces (former Manchuria), and into Korea. It also included sixteen prefectures of North China. Steinhardt, Nancy Shatzman. Liao Architecture. University of Hawaii Press, 1997. https://www.worldcat.org/title/36501227. Nancy Shatzman Steinhardt, Liao Architecture (University of Hawaii Press, 1997), https://www.worldcat.org/title/36501227.

fullText: 少锐王ShaoruiWang韩城城隍庙建筑研究韓城城隍廟建築研究Han cheng cheng huang miao jian zhu yan jiuHancheng chenghuangmiao jianzh yanjiuhttps://architecturasinica.org/bibl/FBQAA9BPhttps://www.zotero.org/groups/architecturasinica/items/FBQAA9BPhttps://www.zotero.org/groups/2267085/items/FBQAA9BP西安2003城隍是古代神话中可以“剪恶除凶，护国保邦，监察幽冥，保安黎庶”的神灵。其信仰属于我国古代民间地方神仙信仰，其建筑类型在我国古代宗教建筑中占据着重要的地位。 本课题所研究的对象为韩城城隍庙，她位于国家级历史文化名城—韩城古城的东北角，2001年被国务院公布为第五批国家重点文物保护单位。建筑群规模宏大，形制完整，是城隍庙建筑中的代表。对它进行研究，不但可以丰富民间宗教建筑宝库，而且能够为研究国家级历史文化名城的保护提供一份比较详尽的资料。 本论文以韩城城隍庙为主要研究对象，以城隍文化为背景，对韩城城隍庙的历史沿革、选址与环境、总体布局、单体建筑及细部特征进行了总结与论证。并且在详细分析与比较建筑群现状的基础上，对韩城城隍庙建筑群总体布局进行了复原探讨，提出了复原保护的意义在于保护韩城城隍庙的历史价值，并指出对韩城城隍庙的保护工作首先应该和国家级历史文化名城的保护相一致，并且需要各方面的通力合作，长时间的坚持下去。最后对韩城城隍庙体现出的总体建筑特征进行了总结。 王少锐. “韩城城隍庙建筑研究.” 硕士, 西安建筑科技大学, 2003. http://kns.cnki.net/KCMS/detail/detail.aspx?dbcode=CMFD&dbname=CMFD9904&filename=2003090685.nh&uid=WEEvREcwSlJHSldRa1FhdXNXaEd1dmtCemw4MzFzR2FhRG10ZGp0MHFXMD0=$9A4hF_YAuvQ5obgVAqNKPCYcEjKensW4IQMovwHtwkF4VYPoHbKxJw!!&v=MjU4MDM3SGJPeEh0ZkVxcEViUElSOGVYMUx1eFlTN0RoMVQzcVRyV00xRnJDVVJMT2ZaZWRwRnl6blZiN0JWMTI=. 王少锐, 韩城城隍庙建筑研究 (硕士, 西安建筑科技大学, 2003), http://kns.cnki.net/KCMS/detail/detail.aspx?dbcode=CMFD&dbname=CMFD9904&filename=2003090685.nh&uid=WEEvREcwSlJHSldRa1FhdXNXaEd1dmtCemw4MzFzR2FhRG10ZGp0MHFXMD0=$9A4hF_YAuvQ5obgVAqNKPCYcEjKensW4IQMovwHtwkF4VYPoHbKxJw!!&v=MjU4MDM3SGJPeEh0ZkVxcEViUElSOGVYMUx1eFlTN0RoMVQzcVRyV00xRnJDVVJMT2ZaZWRwRnl6blZiN0JWMTI=.

author: Xinian, Fu
title: Traditional Chinese Architecture: Twelve Essays
fullText: Xinian,FuNancy Shatzman,SteinhardtAlexandra,HarrerTraditional Chinese Architecture: Twelve Essayshttps://architecturasinica.org/bibl/G3VB5QMDhttps://www.zotero.org/groups/architecturasinica/items/G3VB5QMDhttps://www.zotero.org/groups/2267085/items/G3VB5QMDPrinceton University Press2017Fu Xinian is considered by many to be the world's leading historian of Chinese architecture. He is an expert on every type of Chinese architecture from every period through the nineteenth century, and his work is at the cutting edge of the field. This wide-ranging book gathers together, for the first time in English, twelve seminal essays by Fu Xinian. It pays special attention to the technical aspects of the building tradition since the first millennium BC, and Fu Xinian's signature drawings abundantly illustrate its nuances. The essays delve into the modular basis for individual structures, complexes, and cities; lateral and longitudinal building frames; the unity of sculpture and building to create viewing angles; the influence of Chinese construction on Japanese architecture; and the reliability of images to inform us about architecture. Organized chronologically, the book also examines such topics as the representation of architecture on vessels in the Warring States period, early Buddhist architecture, and the evolution of imperial architecture from the Tang to Ming dynasty. A biography of Fu Xinian and a detailed Chinese-English glossary are included. Bringing together some of the most groundbreaking scholarship in Chinese architectural history, it showcases an uncontested master of the discipline. Fu, Xinian. Traditional Chinese Architecture: Twelve Essays. Edited by Nancy Shatzman Steinhardt. Translated by Alexandra Harrer. Princeton University Press, 2017. http://www.worldcat.org/oclc/983473934. fullText: 彩云陈CaiyunChen墓祭抑或祠祭:元代两浙地区士人家族祭祖方式的转变墓祭抑或祠祭:元代兩浙地區士人家族祭祖方式的轉變Mu ji yi huo ci ji: Yuan dai liang zhe di qu shi ren jia zu ji zu fang shi de zhuan bian Muji yihuo ciji: Yuandai liangzhe diqu shiren jiazu jizu fangshi de zhuanbian https://architecturasinica.org/bibl/GDVKRJ8Yhttps://www.zotero.org/groups/architecturasinica/items/GDVKRJ8Yhttps://www.zotero.org/groups/2267085/items/GDVKRJ8Y安徽史学安徽史學Anhui shi xueAnhui shixue2021141-146元代沿袭前代习俗,加之信仰政策相对放任,士人家族或在寺院、道观中祭祀先人。受社会风气影响,兼容儒家礼制与人情的墓祠祭祖形式也开始盛行,但祭祀对象也不限于男性先祖。受理学社会化、宗族观念演进的影响,部分士人家族在《朱子家礼》指导下,开始设立祠堂以祭祖。元代两浙地区士人家族多种祭祖方式并存,显示出理学所倡导的祭祖方式与宗族组织的结合仍处于发展阶段。 陈彩云. “墓祭抑或祠祭:元代两浙地区士人家族祭祖方式的转变.” 安徽史学, no. 04 (2021): 141–46. 陈彩云, 墓祭抑或祠祭:元代两浙地区士人家族祭祖方式的转变, 安徽史学, no. 04 (2021): 141–46.

fullText: 瑞平樊有恒刘正定开元寺唐三门楼石柱 初步整理与探析(上)https://architecturasinica.org/bibl/GE66HQZBhttps://www.zotero.org/groups/architecturasinica/items/GE66HQZBhttps://www.zotero.org/groups/2267085/items/GE66HQZB文物春秋201458-74正定开元寺三门楼是唐代该寺的山门。唐如意元年(692)高僧日宝所建，北宋大观年间(1107— 1110)重修，清道光年间仅存下层 12 根八角形石柱和一根横梁。清末民初石柱大多倒仆，1980 年运至隆兴寺保 管。1992 年，正定县文物保管所专业人员对残断的石柱进行了拼对、测量、记录。本文在此基础上对残存石柱上 的文字和线刻进行了初步研究，并依据有关资料对三门楼式样进行了揣测。现残存的 12 根石柱虽风化剥蚀较 重，但依然是研究唐代地名、官职、宗教信仰、建筑、雕刻艺术的珍贵实物。2008 年，经粘接、修复的 12 根石柱重 立于开元寺。 樊瑞平, and 刘有恒. “正定开元寺唐三门楼石柱 初步整理与探析(上).” 文物春秋, 2014, 58–74. https://doi.org/10.13635/j.cnki.wwcq.2014.06.009. 樊瑞平 and 刘有恒, 正定开元寺唐三门楼石柱 初步整理与探析(上), 文物春秋, 2014, 58–74, https://doi.org/10.13635/j.cnki.wwcq.2014.06.009.

fullText: 曹雪XueCao襻间考襻間考Pan jian kaoPanjian kaohttps://architecturasinica.org/bibl/GJFJDQNKhttps://www.zotero.org/groups/architecturasinica/items/GJFJDQNKhttps://www.zotero.org/groups/2267085/items/GJFJDQNK2012学界在大木构架方面，向来重视“横架”，因其最能直观体现建筑的结构特征，而对“纵架”探讨较少，因除殿堂结构之外，只有在奉国寺这样横纵交织的构架中纵架才有比较明显的结构意义，这是以“结构美”为主导的研究方向决定的。不过，一方面，纵架是整体构架不可分割的一部分，必然也能够反映出整个建筑的建构思维，另一方面，纵架较之横架更突出的视觉意义，亦当受到重视。本文试从“名、形、意”三方面出发，以探讨术语“襻间”为重点，兼论大木构架“纵架”。文章主体结构的第一部分，从文献角度，以字词字源以及宋《营造法式》文字、图样相互比对，配合实例，探究“襻间”之名；第二部分，从构造角度，以时空两方向比较早期建筑实例襻间的形制特征，探究“襻间”之形，并借此管窥中国古代建筑时代性和地域性特征；第三部分，从视觉艺术角度，分析纵架的各种视觉效果，提炼出不同的空间表现模式，以展现纵架的艺术价值和时代发展轨迹。 曹雪. “襻间考.” 天津大学, 2012. 曹雪, 襻间考 (天津大学, 2012).

keyword: Water Sprites and Ancestor Spirits: Reading the Architecture of Jinci
author: Tracy G. Miller
title: Water Sprites and Ancestor Spirits: Reading the Architecture of Jinci
The Art Bulletin
fullText: Tracy G.MillerWater Sprites and Ancestor Spirits: Reading the Architecture of Jincihttps://architecturasinica.org/bibl/GN5VKUE9https://www.zotero.org/groups/architecturasinica/items/GN5VKUE9https://www.zotero.org/groups/2267085/items/GN5VKUE9The Art Bulletin86[Taylor & Francis, Ltd., College Art Association]20046-30The Jinci temple complex is best known today for the Sage Mother Hall (ca. 1038-87), dedicated to the Spirit of the Jin Springs. But for the literati elite of premodern China, Jinci was dedicated to an ancestral figure, the Zhou dynasty lord Shu Yu of Tang. By integrating architectural evidence into the site's textual history, I show both how Jinci reflects the interests of the agrarian community and how its architecture was manipulated to assert competing interpretations of the Sage Mother's identity in order to claim dominance over the site. Miller, Tracy G. “Water Sprites and Ancestor Spirits: Reading the Architecture of Jinci.” The Art Bulletin 86, no. 1 (2004): 6–30. https://doi.org/10.2307/3177398. Tracy G. 江南佛教寺廟園林之禪意空間研究
Jiang nan fo jiao si miao yuan lin zhi cha yi kong jian yan jiu

fullText: 迪朱DiZhu江南佛教寺庙园林之禅意空间研究江南佛教寺廟園林之禪意空間研究Jiang nan fo jiao si miao yuan lin zhi cha yi kong jian yan jiuJiangnan fojiao zimiao yuanlin zhi chanyi kongjian yanjiuhttps://architecturasinica.org/bibl/GTQZ3UF8https://www.zotero.org/groups/architecturasinica/items/GTQZ3UF8https://www.zotero.org/groups/2267085/items/GTQZ3UF82015本文以江南地区佛教寺庙园林禅意空间设计与表达为研究对象,选取了江南地区具有代表性的佛教寺庙园林为案例,对造园理景中的主题立意、意境类型、空间塑造手法等进行了归纳、分析和研究。禅意空间作为江南地区佛教寺庙园林造园理景的核心内容,已经渗透其园林设计的各个方面。本文通过对江南佛教寺庙园林不同的禅意类型在园林设计中的表达的分析,提出江南地区佛教寺庙园林在禅意空间的塑造与表达上主要有禅修空间、教化空间、朝拜空间、纪念空间四种空间类型,这四种空间类型在主题立意、空间形态塑造、主题意境的表达上各有特点,但都是具有指向禅意空间表达的共性特征。文章还以南京栖霞寺园林设计为例,阐述了在江南佛教寺庙园林设计中,如何结合已有景观要素和条件,从塑造佛教意蕴的禅意空间入手,打造并诠释江南佛教寺庙园林中的禅意主题。全文共分为5个章节:第1章:论文的研究背景、课题研究现状及研究意义,说明研究内容,提出研究框架。第2章:整理分析了江南地区佛教寺庙园林的类型,从环境要素特征、空间组织特征两方面入手,对各个类型的特点做具体分析。第3章:通过对江南地区佛教寺庙园林的现场调研及资料整理,梳理和总结江南佛教寺庙园林中禅意空间的类型,对各个空间类型的形成原因及其形态做具体的分析。同时选取典型案例,分析各个禅意空间造园理景的设计手法与特征。第4章:以南京栖霞寺园林设计为例,重点论述千佛岩景区景观,从主题立意的设定、空间形态的布局、主题意境的表达等方面入手,探讨禅意空间在南京栖霞寺千佛岩景区园林设计中的塑造、表达与传承。第5章:总结全文,指出禅意空间是中国佛教建筑在空间设计与意境表达中的重要内容。禅意表达更是深深契合江南佛教寺庙园林意境设计的核心。在江南,佛教文化已不仅仅局限于宗教范畴,它更是中国传统文化的重要组成;禅意意境的塑造也因契合江南地区优越的自然风光和深厚的人文气息而相得益彰,成为江南佛教寺庙意境表达的主流。禅意空间塑造了江南的佛寺,也成全了江南的地域建筑文化。 朱迪. “江南佛教寺庙园林之禅意空间研究.” 硕士学位论文, 南京工业大学, 2015. 朱迪, 江南佛教寺庙园林之禅意空间研究 (硕士学位论文, 南京工业大学, 2015).

fullText: 天一閣博物館中國社會科學院歷史研究所天聖令整理課題組天一閣藏明鈔本天聖令校證Tian yi ge cang Ming chao ben tian sheng ling jiao zhengTianyige cang Ming chaoben tianshengling jiaozhenghttps://architecturasinica.org/bibl/H7BK9JQFhttps://www.zotero.org/groups/architecturasinica/items/H7BK9JQFhttps://www.zotero.org/groups/2267085/items/H7BK9JQF北京中華書局2006天一阁藏《天圣令》为明乌格抄本，存十卷，虽系残本，却记载着已失传的唐《令》、宋《令》，有许多法律条文是现存史籍中未见记载的，有不少条文比现存史籍所记更完整。从初步整理看，《天圣令》残卷计289条，所载唐《令》有222条。作为目前传世的唐宋时期的唯一一部令典，《天圣令》对于研究中国历史上的令典编撰体例和形式，研究令典的地位和作用，都具有极为重要的学术意义。并且对于中国法制史研究及日本古代律令的形成，都将产生巨大的影响。 天一閣博物館, and 中國社會科學院歷史研究所天聖令整理課題組. 天一閣藏明鈔本天聖令校證. 北京: 中華書局, 2006. http://www.worldcat.org/oclc/1020903200. 天一閣博物館 and 中國社會科學院歷史研究所天聖令整理課題組, 天一閣藏明鈔本天聖令校證 (北京: 中華書局, 2006), http://www.worldcat.org/oclc/1020903200.

fullText: （日）关野贞著；胡稹，于姗姗译ZhenGuanyeShanshanYu中国古代建筑与艺术中國古代建築與藝術Zhongguo gu dai jian zhu yu yi shuZhongguo gudai jianzhu yu yishuhttps://architecturasinica.org/bibl/HT6YXE35https://www.zotero.org/groups/architecturasinica/items/HT6YXE35https://www.zotero.org/groups/2267085/items/HT6YXE35北京中國畫報出版社2017在中日两国建筑史上，关野贞无疑都具有十分重要的地位，他所建立的遗产调查、研究方法和保护理念，对后世有着深远的影响。关野贞也是近代“日本的中国建筑史学”创立者之一。他在涉华建筑与实地考古方面，是一位先驱者，一生来华不下十余次。其侧重建筑与考古研究，尤其是运用考古学方法，对建筑及其艺术作详实考证，以微观研究见长。在1906～1935年之间，关野贞通过对中国建筑的广泛考察和深入研究，逐步形成了自己的中国建筑与遗产观。在这个过程中，关野贞拍摄了大量照片，全面记录了20世纪初中国建筑遗产的保存状况。这些对中国建筑及文物的记录包括陵墓碑碣、石窟造像……内容详细全面，次序条理清晰，兼具整体性与前瞻性，反映了关野贞在遗产记录上的专业素养。关野贞有关中国的论考等，后汇编为《中国古代的建筑与艺术》一书。可以说，这部书是其在中国古建筑与美术研究方面所获成果之集大成，与伊东忠太所著《中国建筑装饰》一起，一直被学界视为中国建筑与艺术研究领域的杰作。这些照片及文字在见证关野贞中国建筑研究生涯的同时，也参与了近代中国建筑史学的建构过程。 （日）关野贞著；胡稹，于姗姗译. 中国古代建筑与艺术. 北京: 中國畫報出版社, 2017. （日）关野贞著；胡稹，于姗姗译, 中国古代建筑与艺术 (北京: 中國畫報出版社, 2017).

fullText: 璞子王故宮博物院古建部PuziWang工程做法注释工程做法注釋Gong cheng zuo fa zhu shihttps://architecturasinica.org/bibl/HXE4ZES5https://www.zotero.org/groups/architecturasinica/items/HXE4ZES5https://www.zotero.org/groups/2267085/items/HXE4ZES5北京中国建筑工业出版社1995本书编辑体例以文字说明为主，极少附图。建筑各作做法，采用条例规程与范例相结合的办法逐款对照说明，基本是按建筑先后安装顺序，由下而上，挨次连贯排列的，既有条例，又有具体尺寸，可以相互对证，避免疑误，虽然缺乏详图，熟于其事者按照文字叙述尺寸，仍然不难制作成型。编辑主旨是作为官工建筑设计通用规范而制订的，对于工程具体操作方法，则多从略，诸如，大木划线方法，瓦作砌筑技术，彩画图案设色彩，界划规矩，油饰工艺流程等都没有详细说明。实际上这些属于实地操作方面的各种规矩要求，一向多掌握在专业匠师之手，工序繁复，有非文字所能形容，而且师徒传授，流派不一，精巧固滞，难归一致。 王璞子. 工程做法注释. Edited by 故宮博物院古建部. 北京: 中国建筑工业出版社, 1995. http://www.worldcat.org/oclc/34466103. 王璞子, 工程做法注释, ed. 故宮博物院古建部 (北京: 中国建筑工业出版社, 1995), http://www.worldcat.org/oclc/34466103.

fullText: 善虹茹文和狄ShanhongRuWenheDi论南京大报恩寺琉璃塔的艺术设计及其古今意义論南京大報恩寺琉璃塔的藝術設計及其古今意義Lun nanjing da bao en si liu li ta de yi shu she ji ji qi gu jin yi yiLun Nanjing dabao'ensi liulita de yishu sheji jiqi gujin yiyihttps://architecturasinica.org/bibl/HXQGQ9E4https://www.zotero.org/groups/architecturasinica/items/HXQGQ9E4https://www.zotero.org/groups/2267085/items/HXQGQ9E4大众文艺201997-98大报恩寺琉璃塔位于南京市秦淮区，是世界建筑史 上的古迹，是中世纪七大奇迹之一，被当时的西方国家认为是 代表中国的标志性建筑。本文通过对大报恩寺琉璃塔的设计的 多维度分析，得出琉璃塔的古今意义:宗教意义、文化意义、 审美观赏意义和作为艺术品的公共性意义。 茹善虹, and 狄文和. “论南京大报恩寺琉璃塔的艺术设计及其古今意义.” 大众文艺, no. 17 (2019): 97–98. 茹善虹 and 狄文和, 论南京大报恩寺琉璃塔的艺术设计及其古今意义, 大众文艺, no. 17 (2019): 97–98.

fullText: 星高XingGao元代衙署建筑形制研究元代衙署建築形製研究Yuan dai ya shu jian zhu xing zhi yan jiuYuandai yashu jianzhu xingzhi yanjiu https://architecturasinica.org/bibl/I5PN7CMKhttps://www.zotero.org/groups/architecturasinica/items/I5PN7CMKhttps://www.zotero.org/groups/2267085/items/I5PN7CMK西安2014衙署是中国古代社会时期官员行使职权的重要场所，是国家政权的象征，是中国古代城市的重要组成部分，是中国古代礼制制度的体现。衙署一般按照行政区划设置，历代的衙署设置由于行政区划的不同而略有差异，但大致可分中央和地方衙署两大类。衙署建筑，是衙署功能的物质承载体，也是衙署所体现的中国传统文化的精神承载体。随着历史的变迁，衙署建筑的遗存数量较少，而且现存衙署建筑大多集中于明清时期，宋及以前的衙署建筑现又无实例留存，对元代衙署建筑研究就十分必要。元代衙署建筑受到元代建筑形制与衙署礼制文化、地域文化的影响，其建筑特征必然体现出各方面综合特征。本论文主要以现存的元代衙署建筑实例：霍州大堂与绛州大堂作为主要研究对象，对元代衙署的建筑功能与布局、建筑尺度与比例、建筑营建形制，建筑装饰艺术与人文艺术等加以比较系统地探讨与研究，分析两座大堂所体现的元代衙署建筑特征。霍州大堂与绛州大堂都是元代州级衙署大堂，是目前发现的年代最早的衙署建筑实例，它们体现出明显的时代性、地域性以及衙署建筑类型的共性特征。对这类建筑的系统研究，无论从历史还是现实都有重要意义。 高星. “元代衙署建筑形制研究.” 硕士, 西安建筑科技大学, 2014. http://kns.cnki.net/KCMS/detail/detail.aspx?dbcode=CMFD&dbname=CMFD201502&filename=1015036974.nh&v=MjU2ODIyNkc3TzdHTmpMcTVFYlBJUjhlWDFMdXhZUzdEaDFUM3FUcldNMUZyQ1VSTE9mWmVkcEZ5em1WTHpLVkY=. 高星, 元代衙署建筑形制研究 (硕士, 西安建筑科技大学, 2014), http://kns.cnki.net/KCMS/detail/detail.aspx?dbcode=CMFD&dbname=CMFD201502&filename=1015036974.nh&v=MjU2ODIyNkc3TzdHTmpMcTVFYlBJUjhlWDFMdXhZUzdEaDFUM3FUcldNMUZyQ1VSTE9mWmVkcEZ5em1WTHpLVkY=.

fullText: 贵祥王Wang隋唐时期佛教寺院与建筑概览隋唐時期佛教寺院與建築概覽Sui tang shi qi fo jiao si yuan yu jian zhu gai lanSuitang shiqi fojiao siyuan yu jianzhu gailanhttps://architecturasinica.org/bibl/I6Y5N96Phttps://www.zotero.org/groups/architecturasinica/items/I6Y5N96Phttps://www.zotero.org/groups/2267085/items/I6Y5N96P中国建筑史论汇刊中國建築史論彙刊Zhong guo jian zhu shi lun hui kanZhongguo jianzhu shilun huikan20133-64自公元581年隋代建立,至公元907年唐代灭亡,在自6世纪末至10世纪初的这300余年里,中国佛教达到了其鼎盛阶段,出现了十余个各具特色的佛教宗系,而由帝王提倡,国家参与的大规模佛寺建造活动,使佛寺建筑也臻于极盛。有隋-代全国有寺3792所,盛唐时期全国有寺5358所,经过安史之乱摧残之后的晚唐时期,全国仍有寺院4600所。而唐代寺院已经开始出现定型化趋势,唐释道宣的《祗洹寺图经》与《戒坛图经》中所描述的理想寺院形式,为后来唐代寺院定型化起到了一定的推动作用。而唐代寺院在佛殿规模,楼阁建造,庭院配置等方面,都达到了前所未有的规模、尺度与数量,如规模最为宏大的寺院中,可以有数十座,甚至近百座院落... 王贵祥. “隋唐时期佛教寺院与建筑概览.” 中国建筑史论汇刊, no. 02 (2013): 3–64. 王贵祥, 隋唐时期佛教寺院与建筑概览, 中国建筑史论汇刊, no. 02 (2013): 3–64.

fullText: 德彝張叔河鐘德彝DeyiZhang航海述奇Hang hai shu qiHanghai shuqihttps://architecturasinica.org/bibl/IF3BAL7Thttps://www.zotero.org/groups/architecturasinica/items/IF3BAL7Thttps://www.zotero.org/groups/2267085/items/IF3BAL7T长沙湖南人民出版社1981.01清同治五年（公元1866年），张德彝十九岁时被清政府委派参加了中国第一次出国旅游团，去欧洲观光。他随团游历了法国、英国、比利时、荷兰、汉堡、丹麦、瑞典、芬兰、俄国、普鲁士等十个国家，饱览了世界风情。在闭关自守的清王朝之外，竟有如此文明开化的另一天地！这活生生的现实使他大开眼界，本来这次出国清政府目的是为了了解洋人内情“探其利弊”，但是张德彝把主要注意力集中到了对泰西（欧洲）新奇文化的观察上，其中对戏剧文化产生了极大的兴趣。回国后，他写出《航海述奇》，详细记载了他的观察见闻。 張德彝. 航海述奇. 11109–165. 长沙: 湖南人民出版社, 1981. 張德彝, 航海述奇, 11109–165 (长沙: 湖南人民出版社, 1981).

keyword: Translating the Ta: Pagoda, Tumulus, and Ritualized Mahāyāna in Seventh-Century China
author: Tracy Miller
title: Translating the Ta: Pagoda, Tumulus, and Ritualized Mahāyāna in Seventh-Century China
Tang Studies
fullText: TracyMillerTranslating the Ta: Pagoda, Tumulus, and Ritualized Mahāyāna in Seventh-Century Chinahttps://architecturasinica.org/bibl/IHT4K5KAhttps://www.zotero.org/groups/architecturasinica/items/IHT4K5KAhttps://www.zotero.org/groups/2267085/items/IHT4K5KATang Studies36Routledge201882-120This essay examines the relationship between pagodas and tombs in Medieval China through a close reading of the “Preface to the Sūtra on the Merits of Constructing a ta, as Spoken by the Buddha” (Foshuo zaota gongde jingxu 佛說造塔功德經序), written by the Silla monk Woncheuk 圓測 (613–696), and an investigation into the cultural environment of the monk himself. Working in and around the cosmopolitan world of court-sponsored Buddhism in both Chang’an and Luoyang, Woncheuk was strongly influenced by Tathāgatagarbha thought, and his interpretation of Yogācāra Buddhism ultimately became very influential in Tibet and Korea. By placing the pagoda in the context of Woncheuk’s thought, as well as recent research on amulets, architecture, and other thaumaturgical devices in the early medieval ritual praxis of South Asia and North China, I argue that Woncheuk’s equation of ta to fen suggests the monuments had more than a memorial or symbolic function. Rather his “Preface” reflects a belief that the two types of architecture were operating on the same technological principles—they were both designed as tools to channel natural, even cosmic, energies through “mountains” and into powerful remains in order to aid in personal and societal salvation. Miller, Tracy. “Translating the Ta: Pagoda, Tumulus, and Ritualized Mahāyāna in Seventh-Century China.” Tang Studies 36, no. 1 (2018): 82–120. https://doi.org/10.1080/07375034.2018.1535236. Tracy Miller, Translating the Ta: Pagoda, Tumulus, and Ritualized Mahāyāna in Seventh-Century China, Tang Studies 36, no. 1 (2018): 82–120, https://doi.org/10.1080/07375034.2018.1535236.

fullText: 十庆张ShiqingZhang南方上昂与挑斡作法探析南方上昂與挑斡作法探析Nan fang shang ang yu tiao wo zuo fa tan xiNanfang shang'ang yu tiaowo zuofa tanxihttps://architecturasinica.org/bibl/IX7FIVYMhttps://www.zotero.org/groups/architecturasinica/items/IX7FIVYMhttps://www.zotero.org/groups/2267085/items/IX7FIVYM建筑史论文集建築史論文集Jian zhu shi lun wen jiJianzhushi lunwen ji16200231-45, 290上昂与挑斡是唐宋以来铺作中的两个构件和作法。二者随时代与地域的不同,在我国南北方表现出相当的差异,宋以后并逐渐演化为江南建筑地方作法。本文希望通过这一探讨,增进对于两宋以来南北建筑的演化以及南方建筑地域特色的认识与理解。 张十庆. “南方上昂与挑斡作法探析.” 建筑史论文集 16, no. 02 (2002): 31–45, 290. 张十庆, 南方上昂与挑斡作法探析, 建筑史论文集 16, no. 02 (2002): 31–45, 290.

fullText: 晓刘XiaoLiu元代家族发展略论——以族谱、族田与祠堂为中心元代家族發展略論——以族譜、族田與祠堂為中心Yuan dai jia zu fa zhan lve lun -- yi zu pu, zu tian yu ci tang wei zhong xinYuandai jiazu fazhan lvelun -- yi zupu, zutian yu citang wei zhongxinhttps://architecturasinica.org/bibl/IYW2CC83https://www.zotero.org/groups/architecturasinica/items/IYW2CC83https://www.zotero.org/groups/2267085/items/IYW2CC83中央民族大学学报(哲学社会科学版)中央民族大学学报(哲学社会科学版)Zhong yang min zu da xue xue bao (zhe xue she hui ke xue ban)Zhongyang minzu daxue xuebao (zhexue shehui kexue ban)45201880-88宋代以后中国家族的发展进入被称为"近代封建家族"或"近世家族"的新阶段,其中以"敬宗收族"为目的而出现的族谱、族田与祠堂,是这一阶段家族组织的三个重要外在表现特征。本文以族谱、族田、祠堂为切入点,通过对元代家族的发展情况做粗略梳理,认为元代中国北方地区因长期受战乱等因素影响,聚族而居的家族组织发展缓慢,且受到一定限制,而江南地区自北宋以来因基本未受外力冲击,家族组织的发展进程则保持了原有的发展势头。 刘晓. “元代家族发展略论——以族谱、族田与祠堂为中心.” 中央民族大学学报(哲学社会科学版) 45, no. 03 (2018): 80–88. https://doi.org/10.15970/j.cnki.1005-8575.2018.03.008. 刘晓, 元代家族发展略论——以族谱、族田与祠堂为中心, 中央民族大学学报(哲学社会科学版) 45, no. 03 (2018): 80–88, https://doi.org/10.15970/j.cnki.1005-8575.2018.03.008.

keyword: What the emperor built : architecture and empire in the early Ming
author: Aurelia. Campbell
title: What the emperor built : architecture and empire in the early Ming
fullText: Aurelia.CampbellWhat the emperor built : architecture and empire in the early Minghttps://architecturasinica.org/bibl/IZLDSV4Khttps://www.zotero.org/groups/architecturasinica/items/IZLDSV4Khttps://www.zotero.org/groups/2267085/items/IZLDSV4K2020One of the most famous rulers in Chinese history, the Yongle emperor (r. 1402-24) gained renown for constructing Beijing's magnificent Forbidden City, directing ambitious naval expeditions, and creating the world's largest encyclopedia. What the Emperor Built is the first book-length study devoted to the architectural projects of a single Chinese emperor. Focusing on the imperial palaces in Beijing, a Daoist architectural complex on Mount Wudang, and a Buddhist temple on the Sino-Tibetan frontier, Aurelia Campbell demonstrates how the siting, design, and use of Yongle's palaces and temples helped cement his authority and legitimize his usurpation of power. Campbell offers insight into Yongle's sense of empire--from the far-flung locations in which he built, to the distant regions from which he extracted construction materials, and to the use of tens of thousands of craftsmen and other laborers. Through his constructions, Yongle connected himself to the divine, interacted with his subjects, and extended imperial influence across space and time. Spanning issues of architectural design and construction technologies, this deft analysis reveals remarkable advancements in timber-frame construction and implements an art-historical approach to examine patronage, audience, and reception, situating the buildings within their larger historical and religious contexts. Campbell, Aurelia. What the Emperor Built : Architecture and Empire in the Early Ming, 2020. Aurelia. Campbell, What the Emperor Built : Architecture and Empire in the Early Ming, 2020.

fullText: 净诸葛景勃薛JingZhugeJingboXue“厅堂”与“厅堂(式构架)”：一个词语的分裂史“厅堂”与“厅堂(式构架)”：一个词语的分裂史"Ting tang" yu "ting tang (shi gou jia)" yi ge ci yu de fen lie shihttps://architecturasinica.org/bibl/J2RZ94SYhttps://www.zotero.org/groups/architecturasinica/items/J2RZ94SYhttps://www.zotero.org/groups/2267085/items/J2RZ94SY建筑学报2021100-107从中国建筑史写作中"厅堂"之建筑和构架类型双重涵义出发,回顾与梳理现代研究及古代文献中"厅堂"的意涵及其渊源,提出作为构架类型的厅堂并非《营造法式》的原意,而是来自现代建筑史学者的诠释;并指出,以19世纪末20世纪初知识体系转型为条件发展起来的关于中国建筑的"结构"话语,使作为构架类型的"厅堂"成为可能;也正是这一新的知识生产条件与《营造法式》时代间的断裂,及两者被容纳于同一词语中的状态,造成了词语的"分裂"。 诸葛净, and 薛景勃. “‘厅堂’与‘厅堂(式构架)’：一个词语的分裂史.” 建筑学报, no. 04 (2021): 100–107. https://doi.org/10.19819/j.cnki.ISSN0529-1399.202104020. 诸葛净 and 薛景勃, ‘厅堂’与‘厅堂(式构架)’：一个词语的分裂史, 建筑学报, no. 04 (2021): 100–107, https://doi.org/10.19819/j.cnki.ISSN0529-1399.202104020.

fullText: 喻梦哲梦哲MengzheYu论10～14世纪木构建筑中串的普及与襻间的退化論10～14世紀木構建築中串的普及與襻間的退化lun 10～14 shi ji mu gou jian zhu zhong chuan de pu ji yu pan jian de tui hualun 10～14 shiji mugou jianzhu zhong chuan de puji yu panjian de tuihuahttps://architecturasinica.org/bibl/JL6SUKL3https://www.zotero.org/groups/architecturasinica/items/JL6SUKL3https://www.zotero.org/groups/2267085/items/JL6SUKL3建筑史建築史jian zhu shijianzhu shi201712-19涉及我国木构建筑体系发展历程的研究,在选择切入点时多强调构架整体性的增强趋势,考察对象集中于柱、梁、铺作等结构构件层面。本文从联系补强类构件入手,通过比较10~14世纪木构建筑中串和襻间这两类辅助性构件此消彼长的使用情况,从另一个侧面论述建筑技术不断进化的事实。 喻梦哲. “论10～14世纪木构建筑中串的普及与襻间的退化.” 建筑史, no. 1 (2017): 12–19. https://kns.cnki.net/kcms2/article/abstract?v=f2Ae6OvU-JLx7FgqJg7pJ_QypeTqdWyHmtZQF2FyD__IhkroRhhFyWdjDZ6EqtMn1WfMb6WHRSLkbLawZUXCrQc6AhjkxgtzZ2jQ66M_NDOOf24abkfm2IuejgKrPoYbfr4UMkxY71Y=&uniplatform=NZKPT&language=CHS. 喻梦哲, 论10～14世纪木构建筑中串的普及与襻间的退化, 建筑史, no. 1 (2017): 12–19, https://kns.cnki.net/kcms2/article/abstract?v=f2Ae6OvU-JLx7FgqJg7pJ_QypeTqdWyHmtZQF2FyD__IhkroRhhFyWdjDZ6EqtMn1WfMb6WHRSLkbLawZUXCrQc6AhjkxgtzZ2jQ66M_NDOOf24abkfm2IuejgKrPoYbfr4UMkxY71Y=&uniplatform=NZKPT&language=CHS.

fullText: 青田任QingtianRen山西省定襄县关王庙大殿建筑山西省定襄縣關王廟大殿建築Shanxi sheng dingxiang xian guan wang miao da dian jian zhuShanxisheng dingxiangxian guangwangmiao dadian jianzhuhttps://architecturasinica.org/bibl/JQL63672https://www.zotero.org/groups/architecturasinica/items/JQL63672https://www.zotero.org/groups/2267085/items/JQL63672古建园林技术古建園林藝術Gu jian yuan lin yi shuGujian yuanlin yishu200635-37+66-67关王庙,位于山西省定襄县城北关,为定襄二中所占,现仅存大殿,山西省重点文物保护单位。殿内现存元至正碑一通,金泰和八年碣一块。据清雍正《定襄县志》和现存碑碣,关王庙始建于唐,为悯忠祠,元至正年间更名寿圣寺。现存大殿原为寿圣寺西配殿。元末寺废,独存西配殿,改用并称为关王庙至今。 任青田. “山西省定襄县关王庙大殿建筑.” 古建园林技术, no. 04 (2006): 35-37+66-67. http://kns.cnki.net/KCMS/detail/detail.aspx?dbcode=CJFQ&dbname=CJFD2006&filename=GJYL200604013&v=MDM3NTRxVHJXTTFGckNVUkxPZlplZHBGeS9sVnJ2T0lpZlNZckc0SHRmTXE0OUVaNFI4ZVgxTHV4WVM3RGgxVDM=. 任青田, 山西省定襄县关王庙大殿建筑, 古建园林技术, no. 04 (2006): 35-37+66-67, http://kns.cnki.net/KCMS/detail/detail.aspx?dbcode=CJFQ&dbname=CJFD2006&filename=GJYL200604013&v=MDM3NTRxVHJXTTFGckNVUkxPZlplZHBGeS9sVnJ2T0lpZlNZckc0SHRmTXE0OUVaNFI4ZVgxTHV4WVM3RGgxVDM=.

fullText: 彭明浩MinghaoPeng试析“替木式短栱”试析“替木式短栱”Shi xi "ti mu shi duan gong"https://architecturasinica.org/bibl/K7958QVGhttps://www.zotero.org/groups/architecturasinica/items/K7958QVGhttps://www.zotero.org/groups/2267085/items/K7958QVG中国建筑史论汇刊中國建築史論彙刊Zhongguo jian zhu shi lun hui kanZhongguo jianzhu shilun huikan201479-93"替木式短栱"是栌斗上用替木承栱的特殊做法,营造学社时期梁思成、刘敦桢等先生已有关注。本文在先生们研究的基础上,尽可能全面地搜集相关材料,梳理这种做法在不同时期的分布和形式演变,从其最早的形式出发,推断其源于低等建筑中"单斗只替"做法,并从结构功能角度,指出这种做法中替木作为棋使用的趋势,反映了替木衍化为栱这一历史过程。 彭明浩. “试析‘替木式短栱.’” 中国建筑史论汇刊, no. 1 (2014): 79–93. https://kns.cnki.net/kcms2/article/abstract?v=3uoqIhG8C44wp2hFvIb_znleNvEqg4RtCv9vPRf2sA-CL5uDETJehkewN6YbTLHTb8tLTmTabhJJP0oBM22iOBX8bZeVCTXu&uniplatform=NZKPT. 彭明浩, 试析‘替木式短栱,’ 中国建筑史论汇刊, no. 1 (2014): 79–93, https://kns.cnki.net/kcms2/article/abstract?v=3uoqIhG8C44wp2hFvIb_znleNvEqg4RtCv9vPRf2sA-CL5uDETJehkewN6YbTLHTb8tLTmTabhJJP0oBM22iOBX8bZeVCTXu&uniplatform=NZKPT.

title: Walls and Gates, Windows and Mirrors: Urban Defences, Cultural Memory, and Security Theatre in Song Kaifeng

publisher: International Society of East Asian Science, Technology, and Medicine
fullText: Ari DanielLevineWalls and Gates, Windows and Mirrors: Urban Defences, Cultural Memory, and Security Theatre in Song Kaifenghttps://architecturasinica.org/bibl/KADM694Ahttps://www.zotero.org/groups/architecturasinica/items/KADM694Ahttps://www.zotero.org/groups/2267085/items/KADM694AEast Asian Science, Technology, and MedicineInternational Society of East Asian Science, Technology, and Medicine201455-118[Abstract Kaifeng, the capital of the Northern Song (960-1127) dynasty, boasted sophisticated siege defence installations, which were ultimately breached by the Jurchen invasion of 1126-1127. According to both the archaeological and textual evidence, its concentric city walls and militarized gates with barbicans and bastions represented a crucial stage in the militarization of urban form in early-modern China, as well as a more open approach to planning. While Kaifeng’s urban defences evoked imperial majesty and personal security for Northern Song residents who described them, diasporic literati of the Southern Song (1127-1279) invoked the violation of this defensive perimeter as a metonym for the invasion of their lost homeland. The concept of security theatre explains how Northern Song Kaifeng’s city walls and gates could simultaneously function as efficacious siege defence installations and be perceived as symbolic defences.] Levine, Ari Daniel. “Walls and Gates, Windows and Mirrors: Urban Defences, Cultural Memory, and Security Theatre in Song Kaifeng.” East Asian Science, Technology, and Medicine, no. 39 (2014): 55–118. http://www.jstor.org.proxy.library.vanderbilt.edu/stable/eastasiascietech.39.55. Ari Daniel Levine, Walls and Gates, Windows and Mirrors: Urban Defences, Cultural Memory, and Security Theatre in Song Kaifeng, East Asian Science, Technology, and Medicine, no. 39 (2014): 55–118, http://www.jstor.org.proxy.library.vanderbilt.edu/stable/eastasiascietech.39.55.

fullText: 熹年傅XinianFu福建的几座宋代建筑及其与日本鎌仓“大佛样”建筑的关系福建的幾座宋代建築及其與日本鎌倉“大佛樣”建築的關係Fujian de ji zuo Song dai jian zhu ji qi yu Riben Liancang da fo yang jian zhu de guan xi Fujian de jizuo Songdai jianzhu jiqi yu Riben Liancang dafoyang jianzhu de guanxi https://architecturasinica.org/bibl/KBENFNYGhttps://www.zotero.org/groups/architecturasinica/items/KBENFNYGhttps://www.zotero.org/groups/2267085/items/KBENFNYG建筑学报198168-77<正> 福建省解放以后发现了福州华林寺大殿、莆田玄妙观三清殿和泰宁甘露庵三处宋代木构建筑。它们除具有宋代建筑的一般特点,并由于地区偏僻,在某种程度上保存着一些更为古老的做法外,还有很浓厚的地方特色,为研究宋代和宋以前南方建筑的发展提供了重要史料。尤其值得注意的是,那些福建地区的建筑特色和日本镰仓时期从中国南宋传过去的“大佛样”建筑极为相像,证明“大佛样”是传自南宋福建的地方建筑式样,为了解古代中日两国文化交流提供了重要的物证。 傅熹年. “福建的几座宋代建筑及其与日本鎌仓‘大佛样’建筑的关系.” 建筑学报, no. 04 (1981): 68–77. 傅熹年, 福建的几座宋代建筑及其与日本鎌仓‘大佛样’建筑的关系, 建筑学报, no. 04 (1981): 68–77.

fullText: 志翘董ZhiqiaoDong《唐律疏议》词语杂考《唐律疏議》詞語雜考Tang lv shu yi ci yu za kaoTanglv shuyi ciyu zakaohttps://architecturasinica.org/bibl/KHXC8Q5Whttps://www.zotero.org/groups/architecturasinica/items/KHXC8Q5Whttps://www.zotero.org/groups/2267085/items/KHXC8Q5W南京师大学报(社会科学版)2002174-183唐长孙无忌等所撰的《唐律疏议》是古代法制文献的典范 ,在中国及世界法制史上均占有重要地位。德国学者 N·麦考密克曾指出 :“法学其实不过是一门法律语言学。”正确理解与阐述我国古代法制文献的语言 ,不仅对了解、研究、借鉴我国古代法律具有重要意义 ,同时也是汉语史研究的任务之一。本文选取《唐律疏议》中法制词语八例 ,其中或为目前大型语文性辞书所失收 ,或为前人疏解不当及有未尽之处者 ,参以其他文献用例 ,加以考释 董志翘. “《唐律疏议》词语杂考.” 南京师大学报(社会科学版), no. 4 (2002): 174–83. 董志翘, 《唐律疏议》词语杂考, 南京师大学报(社会科学版), no. 4 (2002): 174–83.

title: 延福寺大殿大木技术探析--从大木构架之分析比较入手
延福寺大殿大木技術探析--從大木構架之分析比較入手

fullText: 亚宣张YaxuanZhang延福寺大殿大木技术探析--从大木构架之分析比较入手延福寺大殿大木技術探析--從大木構架之分析比較入手Yan fu si da dian da mu ji shu tan xi --cong da mu gou jia zhi fen xi bi jiao ru shouYanfusi dadian damu jishu tanxi--cong damugoujia zhi fenxi bijiao rushouhttps://architecturasinica.org/bibl/KS2ED8QDhttps://www.zotero.org/groups/architecturasinica/items/KS2ED8QDhttps://www.zotero.org/groups/2267085/items/KS2ED8QD2017本文从武义延福寺大殿的个案剖析出发,抽取大木构架这一角度,采取比较研究的方法,对大殿大木构架存在的诸多线索加以分析解读,并提出作者的思考。首先,对延福寺大殿的勘测结果作有效分析,包括构架形制判定和大殿基本尺度的复原。其次,选取大木构架的几处典型作法分别进行讨论,结合相关案例的比较,从木构现象差异找出本质差异。再者,以延福寺大殿的个案分析比较作为起点,梳理江南大木构架时空发展变化的规律。最后,说明构架的整体关联性,对大殿构架复原作合理推测。作为个案的研究成果,作者分析了构架细节性的节点,如山、檐面劄牵的榫卯节点,中三椽袱、顺栿串等构件节点;解答了之前未解决的问题,如对侧脚、下檐、转角及厦两头造的探讨;层层推进,在实证基础上,对构架复原作出新的推测。从大木构架的整体研究得出结论,大殿兼具时空节点的特征,同一时空下匠作谱系亦具有差异性。写作思路上,从微观推及宏观,再从共性中讨论个性,以小题作为切入点,后置于更大的视角中去看待个案研究,力求小中见大,全面深入。 张亚宣. “延福寺大殿大木技术探析--从大木构架之分析比较入手.” 硕士論文, 东南大学, 2017. http://kns.cnki.net/KCMS/detail/detail.aspx?dbcode=CMFD&dbname=CMFD201801&filename=1018006291.nh&v=MjQ0NTBoMVQzcVRyV00xRnJDVVJMT2ZaZWRwRnkzaFdyek1WRjI2RnJPNEdOUEZycEViUElSOGVYMUx1eFlTN0Q=. 张亚宣, 延福寺大殿大木技术探析--从大木构架之分析比较入手 (硕士論文, 东南大学, 2017), http://kns.cnki.net/KCMS/detail/detail.aspx?dbcode=CMFD&dbname=CMFD201801&filename=1018006291.nh&v=MjQ0NTBoMVQzcVRyV00xRnJDVVJMT2ZaZWRwRnkzaFdyek1WRjI2RnJPNEdOUEZycEViUElSOGVYMUx1eFlTN0Q=.

fullText: 中国社会科学院考古研究所南京博物院扬州市文化局扬州城考古队Zhong guo she hui ke xue yuan kao gu yan jiu suoNan jing bo wu yuanYang zhou shi wen hua ju yang zhou kao gu dui扬州城考古工作简报揚州城考古工作簡報Yang zhou cheng kao gu gong zuo jian baoYangzhoucheng kaogu gongzuo jianbaohttps://architecturasinica.org/bibl/KTQARTXPhttps://www.zotero.org/groups/architecturasinica/items/KTQARTXPhttps://www.zotero.org/groups/2267085/items/KTQARTXP考古考古Kao guKaogu199036-44<正> 1986年由中国社会科学院考古研究所、南京博物院和扬州市文化局协商,联合组成扬州城考古队,对扬州城进行考古勘察与发掘,现把这两年的工作情况简报如下。一、考古勘探扬州是有二千四百多年的悠久历史城市。唐代的扬州城,有"富庶甲天下,时人称扬一益二"的声誉。从文献记载和我们勘察的结果,唐代扬州城规模很大,仅次于当时的长安与洛阳的东西二京城。唐代扬州城城址分两个部分,一部分在现今城北郊2公里的蜀岗上,一部分在低于二、三十米蜀岗下的平地上。蜀岗上为一小城,即子城,亦称牙城,也是"衙城"的意思。小城为一不规整的多边形。蜀岗下为一大城,即罗城,呈南北向的长方形。小城位于大城的西北角上。整座城址南北(指大城南城墙至小城北城墙)长6030米,东西(指大城)宽3120米(图一)。 中国社会科学院考古研究所, 南京博物院, and 扬州市文化局扬州城考古队. “扬州城考古工作简报.” 考古, no. 01 (1990): 36–44. 中国社会科学院考古研究所, 南京博物院, and 扬州市文化局扬州城考古队, 扬州城考古工作简报, 考古, no. 01 (1990): 36–44.
