世界建筑
fullText: 路珂李怡菲杨LukeLiYifeiYang礼用之间——中国建筑、文献与图像中的顶棚禮用之間--中國建築、文獻與圖像中的頂棚Li yong zhi jian: zhong guo jian zhu, wen xian yu tu xiang zhong de ding pengLiyong zhijian: zhongguo jianzhu, wenxian yu tuxiang zhong de dingpenghttps://architecturasinica.org/bibl/KYKAC4Y7https://www.zotero.org/groups/architecturasinica/items/KYKAC4Y7https://www.zotero.org/groups/2267085/items/KYKAC4Y7世界建筑202318-27本文通过文字史料、图像史料、考古遗存和建筑实例，简要回顾了中国从穴居时代到晚清时期的顶棚发展史。数千年前，顶棚不仅作为一种重要的功能性部件，更重要的是，它成为礼制系统的一部分，被赋予了尊崇和中心的意义。此后的顶棚吸收了诸多富有象征性的形式要素，并由结构策略和几何法则构筑其基本语汇体系，这些基本语汇的巧妙排列和丰富变化，是中国建筑体系采用简约统一的构架形式塑造千变万化的场所特性的关键所在。 李路珂, and 杨怡菲. “礼用之间——中国建筑、文献与图像中的顶棚.” 世界建筑, no. 3 (2023): 18–27. https://doi.org/10.16414/j.wa.2023.03.014. 李路珂 and 杨怡菲, 礼用之间——中国建筑、文献与图像中的顶棚, 世界建筑, no. 3 (2023): 18–27, https://doi.org/10.16414/j.wa.2023.03.014.

fullText: 熹年傅XinianFu关于展子虔《游春图》年代的探讨關於展子虞《遊春圖》年代的探討Guan yu Zhan zi qian 'You chun tu' nian dai de tan taoGuanyu Zhanziqian 'Youchuntu' niandai de tantaohttps://architecturasinica.org/bibl/L5TJC5PIhttps://www.zotero.org/groups/architecturasinica/items/L5TJC5PIhttps://www.zotero.org/groups/2267085/items/L5TJC5PI文物文物Wen wuWenwu197840-52<正> 故宫博物院藏"展子虔《游春图》"是数百年来颇负盛名的一幅古代绘画,著录于元周密《云烟过眼录》、明文嘉《严氏书画记》、詹景凤《玄览编》、张丑《清河书画舫》、清吴升《大观录》、安岐《墨缘汇观》和《石渠宝笈续编》等重要书画著录书籍中。在画前隔水上有宋赵佶(徽宗)題"展子虔游春图"六字。八百年来这幅画历经宋赵佶、贾似道,元仁宗鲁国大长公主祥哥刺吉,明严嵩、严世蕃父子、韩世能、韩朝延父子,清安岐、弘历(乾隆帝)等人递藏。用 傅熹年. “关于展子虔《游春图》年代的探讨.” 文物, no. 11 (1978): 40–52. http://kns.cnki.net/kns/detail/detail.aspx?FileName=WENW197811005&DbName=CJFQ1979. 傅熹年, 关于展子虔《游春图》年代的探讨, 文物, no. 11 (1978): 40–52, http://kns.cnki.net/kns/detail/detail.aspx?FileName=WENW197811005&DbName=CJFQ1979.

fullText: ゴウン崔韓国,中国,日本の挿肘木に関する研究(その2): 挿肘木の機能についてhttps://architecturasinica.org/bibl/LDNCC7HHhttps://www.zotero.org/groups/architecturasinica/items/LDNCC7HHhttps://www.zotero.org/groups/2267085/items/LDNCC7HH日本建築学会計画系論文集682003343-347Sashihijiki forms a part of a bracket system supporting beams, rafters and eaves, It has long been considered as an imported element from Fujian province, southern China. This paper intends (1) to elucidate how Sashihijiki functions in Korea, China and Japan, and (2) to contrast how its functions differ from each other. It is found that the provenance of Sashihijiki appears to be different in each country. With this comparison, it is found that Korean Sashihijiki has a different root while Chinese and Japanese have the same one. 崔ゴウン. “韓国,中国,日本の挿肘木に関する研究(その2): 挿肘木の機能について.” 日本建築学会計画系論文集 68, no. 565 (2003): 343–47. https://doi.org/10.3130/aija.68.343. 崔ゴウン, 韓国,中国,日本の挿肘木に関する研究(その2): 挿肘木の機能について, 日本建築学会計画系論文集 68, no. 565 (2003): 343–47, https://doi.org/10.3130/aija.68.343.

keyword: The Cambridge History of China. Volume 11, Late Ch'ing, 1800-1911, Part 2
title: The Cambridge History of China. Volume 11, Late Ch'ing, 1800-1911, Part 2
Cambridge History of China
fullText: John KingFairbankKwang-ChingLiuThe Cambridge History of China. Volume 11, Late Ch'ing, 1800-1911, Part 2https://architecturasinica.org/bibl/LJCMYA86https://www.zotero.org/groups/architecturasinica/items/LJCMYA86https://www.zotero.org/groups/2267085/items/LJCMYA86CambridgeUniversity Press1980Cambridge History of ChinaThis is the second of two volumes in this major Cambridge history dealing with the gradual decline of the Ch'ing empire in China (the first was volume 10). Volume 11 surveys the persistence and deterioration of the old order in China during the late nineteenth century, and the profound stirring during that period, which led to China's great twentieth-century revolution. The contributors focus on commercial and technological growth, foreign relations, the stimulation of Chinese intellectual life by the outside world, and military triumphs and disasters. They show that the effects of the accelerating changes were to fragment the old ruling class and the ancient monarchy, finally bringing the Chinese people face to face with the challenges of the new century. For readers with Chinese, proper names and terms are identified with their characters in the glossary, and full references to Chinese, Japanese and other works are given in the bibliographies. Fairbank, John King, and Kwang-Ching Liu, eds. The Cambridge History of China. Volume 11, Late Ch’ing, 1800-1911, Part 2. Cambridge History of China. keyword: The “Religion of Images”? Buddhist Image Worship in the Early Medieval Chinese Imagination
Journal of the American Oriental Society
author: Eric M. Greene
title: The “Religion of Images”? Buddhist Image Worship in the Early Medieval Chinese Imagination
Journal of the American Oriental Society
fullText: Eric M.GreeneThe “Religion of Images”? Buddhist Image Worship in the Early Medieval Chinese Imaginationhttps://architecturasinica.org/bibl/LWXIHWH5https://www.zotero.org/groups/architecturasinica/items/LWXIHWH5https://www.zotero.org/groups/2267085/items/LWXIHWH5Journal of the American Oriental Society138American Oriental Society2018455-484This paper explores how image worship was conceptualized and represented by Chinese authors during the first four centuries of Buddhist presence in China (to roughly 500 ce). Previous scholarship has argued that image worship was initially seen in China as a distinctively Buddhist practice, so much so that Buddhism was even known to the Chinese as the “Religion of Images” (xiangjiao 像教). By examining the history of the interpretation of this term, the evolution of stories about sacred images, and the presentation (or lack thereof) of image worship in debates about the compatibility of Buddhism with Chinese culture, I will argue that image worship was first seen as a distinctly Buddhist or non-Chinese practice only in the late fifth century. Ironically, image worship came to be seen or represented as “foreign” only long after it had already become part of most forms of Chinese religion. Greene, Eric M. “The ‘Religion of Images’? Buddhist Image Worship in the Early Medieval Chinese Imagination.” Journal of the American Oriental Society 138, no. 3 (2018): 455–84. https://doi.org/10.7817/jameroriesoci.138.3.0455. Eric M. Greene, The ‘Religion of Images’? Buddhist Image Worship in the Early Medieval Chinese Imagination, Journal of the American Oriental Society 138, no. 3 (2018): 455–84, https://doi.org/10.7817/jameroriesoci.138.3.0455.

fullText: 友恒刘宁杜探考正定开元寺法船殿https://architecturasinica.org/bibl/M54ZNM93https://www.zotero.org/groups/architecturasinica/items/M54ZNM93https://www.zotero.org/groups/2267085/items/M54ZNM93博物馆1201766-71Kaiyuan Temple is the oldest temple in Zhengding city, Hebei Province. It still remains the layout of Tang Dynasty. Unfortunately, Fachuan Hall, the main hall in the temple, was destroyed in 1966 and only the site of hall base left behind, so few researcher pay attention to the information of this hall. This essay analyses the stele inscription, historical resources and objects remained today, and examines the historical development of Fachuan Hall. The conclusion confirms the dating of Fachuan Hall when Liang Sicheng came to Zhengding in 1933 and shows more details about this hall and the Buddhist statues in it. 刘友恒, and 杜宁. “探考正定开元寺法船殿.” 博物馆 1, no. 5 (2017): 66–71. https://doi.org/10.3724/2096-1715.2017.001.005.066. 刘友恒 and 杜宁, 探考正定开元寺法船殿, 博物馆 1, no. 5 (2017): 66–71, https://doi.org/10.3724/2096-1715.2017.001.005.066.

fullText: 明华张维昌孙MinghuaZhang WeichangSun上海市松江县兴圣教寺塔地宫发掘简报上海市松江縣興聖教寺塔地宮發掘簡報Shanghai shi Song jiang xian Xing sheng jiao si ta di gong fa jue jian baoShanghai shi Songjiang xian Xingshengjiao si ta digong fajue jianbaohttps://architecturasinica.org/bibl/MAGI7IHWhttps://www.zotero.org/groups/architecturasinica/items/MAGI7IHWhttps://www.zotero.org/groups/2267085/items/MAGI7IHW考古考古Kao guKaogu1219831125-1129, 1159-1160松江兴圣教寺塔位于城厢镇东南三公街,为上海市级文物保护单位。因为塔身呈方柱形,当地人亦称方塔（下简称方塔）。塔身九级,总高48.5米,此塔多方面呈现唐代的遗风,是北宋砖木结构楼阁式塔中比较典型的建筑（图版渠,1）。据元人任叔实《兴圣教寺记》载,方塔始建于宋熙宁、元祐年间。1975年,曾于第七层斗拱壁缝中发现了熙宁、祥符、元丰铜钱,证实方塔确系北宋时期所建。自元至元二十一年（1284）至清道光二十四年（1844）曾多次对方塔进行过整修。为了妥善保护好这一古建筑,上海市文物保管委员会决定予以维修。为配合这一工程,1974年11月7日至10日,对该塔地宫进行了发掘。发掘工作是在塔内底层中心部位进行 张明华, and 孙维昌. “上海市松江县兴圣教寺塔地宫发掘简报.” 考古 12 (1983): 1125–29, 1159–60. 张明华 and 孙维昌, 上海市松江县兴圣教寺塔地宫发掘简报, 考古 12 (1983): 1125–29, 1159–60.

fullText: 漢語大詞典編纂処Hanyu dacidian bianzhuanchu汉语大词典编纂处漢語大詞典Han yu da ci dianHanyu dacidianhttps://architecturasinica.org/bibl/MLHB8LJFhttps://www.zotero.org/groups/architecturasinica/items/MLHB8LJFhttps://www.zotero.org/groups/2267085/items/MLHB8LJFdigital edition上海上海辭書出版社2008-2011《汉语大词典》是一部大型的、历史性的汉语语文辞典，由罗竹风主编，中国汉语大词典编辑委员会、汉语大词典编纂处编纂。全书12卷，另有《索引•附录》1卷，共收单字2.27万，复词37.5万，合计5000余万字，并配有插图2000余幅。《汉语大词典》按照“古今兼收，源流并重”的历史原则编纂，强调“语文性”和“历史性”，以其释义准确、义项齐备、书证翔实、体例严谨，能够反映汉语词汇发展演变的面貌等特点而成为我国汉语语文词典史上的一座里程碑。 《汉语大词典订补》是《汉语大词典》的订补本。《订补》着重解决的，主要是成于众手的大型汉语语文辞书往往存在的一些通病，如收词立义有缺陷、书证晚出、注音未当、体例不统一、前后不一致、编排印刷有错误等，同时酌情增收一部分应予以补充的新词新语。全书共收单字条目和多字条目30,000余条，所收条目主要有新增条目、订讹条目、补义条目和补证条目。 《康熙字典》是清圣祖康熙四十九年（一七一O）“谕令”陈廷敬、张玉书等编撰，至康熙五十五年（一七一六）成书的。该书以子、丑、寅、卯等地支分为十二集，每集再分上、中、下三卷，共四十二卷，共收字四万七千零四十三个。问世后被誉为《说文》、《玉篇》以后历代字书的集大成之作，可以满足读者阅读和研究古典文献时查检的基本需求。 漢語大詞典編纂処, ed. 漢語大詞典. Digital edition. 上海: 上海辭書出版社, 2008. 漢語大詞典編纂処, ed., 漢語大詞典, digital edition (上海: 上海辭書出版社, 2008).

日本建築学会計画系論文集
author: 章 中西
title: 高麗時代柱心包系建築の「挿肘木」について
日本建築学会計画系論文集
fullText: 章中西高麗時代柱心包系建築の「挿肘木」についてhttps://architecturasinica.org/bibl/MLV9XHF7https://www.zotero.org/groups/architecturasinica/items/MLV9XHF7https://www.zotero.org/groups/2267085/items/MLV9XHF7日本建築学会計画系論文集862021277-283This paper is study on the "Sashihijiki" of the Jusimpo style architecture in the Goryeo era. The subjects of research are the 9 buildings shown in Table 1. The "Sashihijik" of the Jusimpo style architecture in Korea is different from that of China and Japan. The "Sashihjiki" of the Jusimpo style architecture is not the orthodox "Sashihijiki" that is inserted into the column, but the fitted in the top of the column. .In addition, there were two types of "Sashihijiki" in the Jusimpo style architecture in the Goryeo era. One is a "Sashihijiki" that reinforce the structure and the other is a simple "Sashihijiki" fitted at the top of column. The former is found at Sudeoksa Daeungjeon (Fig. 1), Seongbulsa Geugnakjeon(Fig. 2), and so on, and the latter is found at Buseoksa Josadang(Fig. 3), Gangneung Gaeksamun(Fig. 4), and so on. They have different geographical distributions(Fig. 7). Buildings with the "Sashihijiki" that reinforce the structure are located in the area near the center of Goryeo Dynasty -namely Gaeseong or Ganghwa, and the buildings with the "Sashihijiki" symply fitted at the top of column are located in the area away from the center. This shows the process of popularization of "Sashihijiki", the old form remains in the areas far from the center, and the more developed "Sashihijiki" spread in the near the center. And it shows the process of development of "Sashihijiki". That is, it changed from a simple "Sashihijiki" fitted at the top of the column to a "Sashihijiki" that reinforce the structure. The change to the "Sashihijiki" that reinforce the structure mentioned above was made independently in the Jusimpo style architecture at the Goryeo era. In addition, it is possible that the "Sashihijiki" that was simply fitted in the top of the column also created in Korea. On the other hand, such "Sashihijiki" that is simply fitted in the top of the column is also found in Chinese and Japanese architecture related to Fujian architecture. It is buildings in Kaiyuansi(Fig. 10) at Fujian of China and buildings related to Daibutsuyo style architecture(Fig. 11) in Japan. It considers that such a "Sashihijiki" is a modification of the orthodox "Sashihijiki". Therefore, it is unlikely that such “Sashihijiki” was created independently in Korea at the same time as China and Japan. In addition, there is a high possibility that the orthodox "Sashihijiki" inserted into the column was known in Goryeo through Southern Song. In the painting of Goryeo, Ajipdo Daeryeon(Fig. 13), the orthodox "Sashihijiki" brought from the Southern Song is drawn. And "Sashihijiki" of Eunhaesa Gojoan Yeongsanjeon (Fig. 5) is double-layered, and there is posibility that the below one is a trace of the orthodoxl "Sashihijiki" that inserted into the column. That is, there is high possibility that Fujian architecture of China was known in Korea. Theerfore it is considered that under the influence of Fujian architecture from Southern Song "Sashihijiki" was made in Goryeo. And then "Sashihijiki" has developed and spread independently in the Jusimpo style architecture of Goryeo. 中西章. “高麗時代柱心包系建築の「挿肘木」について.” 日本建築学会計画系論文集 86, no. 779 (2021): 277–83. https://doi.org/10.3130/aija.86.277. 中西章, 高麗時代柱心包系建築の「挿肘木」について, 日本建築学会計画系論文集 86, no. 779 (2021): 277–83, https://doi.org/10.3130/aija.86.277.

fullText: 晗孔HanKong沈阳故宫建筑天花的特点及设计理念沈陽故宮建築天花的特點及設計理念Shen yang gu gong jian zhu tian hua de te dian ji she ji li nianShenyang gugong jianzhu tianhua de tedian ji sheji linianhttps://architecturasinica.org/bibl/N35CG6C9https://www.zotero.org/groups/architecturasinica/items/N35CG6C9https://www.zotero.org/groups/2267085/items/N35CG6C9沈阳故宫博物院院刊2010115-119+5<正>沈阳故宫是清入关前具有满族建筑风格的皇家宫殿建筑,由于建筑本身内容十分丰富,长期以来一直受到众多学者的关注。本人经过对前辈的研究成果加以整理,发现对盛京皇宫天花的研究尚显不足,也并无专文研究。因此,本文将就沈阳故宫建筑天花的特点及设计理念与专家学者进行探讨,希望以此能对宫殿建筑的研究有所稗益。 孔晗. “沈阳故宫建筑天花的特点及设计理念.” 沈阳故宫博物院院刊, no. 1 (2010): 115-119+5. 孔晗, 沈阳故宫建筑天花的特点及设计理念, 沈阳故宫博物院院刊, no. 1 (2010): 115-119+5.

fullText: 毅捷张YijieZhang普拍方普拍方Pu pai fangPupaifanghttps://architecturasinica.org/bibl/N9BWM8MFhttps://www.zotero.org/groups/architecturasinica/items/N9BWM8MFhttps://www.zotero.org/groups/2267085/items/N9BWM8MF古建园林技术201178-80<正>普拍方是铺作层利柱子之间带有过渡性质的联系构件,在柱子之间起联系作用,并承补间和柱头铺作,再将铺作层传来的荷载传递给柱子和阑额。在日本这个构件被称作台轮。现存十一座日本古代(飞鸟、奈良、平安时代)建造的层塔建筑(包含两座建筑雏形)中有十座塔在各层檐柱上施台轮(普拍方),唯一例外的法隆寺五重塔也在初重檐柱上设台轮,在2-5层的檐柱上以长押材[1]方式作山台轮的造型。这表明台轮这一建筑构件是随层塔建筑一起由外界传入日本的。如果这一构件是由中国传入日本,那么就说明在七世纪的中国已经使用普拍方了。本文尝试就普拍方在中国古代建筑中的施用情况做一梳理。 张毅捷. “普拍方.” 古建园林技术, no. 04 (2011): 78–80. 张毅捷, 普拍方, 古建园林技术, no. 04 (2011): 78–80.

fullText: 子奇王ZiqiWang山西定襄关王庙考察札记山西定襄關王廟考察札記Shanxi dingxiang guan wang miao kao cha zha jiShanxi dingxiang guanwangmiao kaocha zhajihttps://architecturasinica.org/bibl/NH2V5JCLhttps://www.zotero.org/groups/architecturasinica/items/NH2V5JCLhttps://www.zotero.org/groups/2267085/items/NH2V5JCL山西大同大学学报(社会科学版)山西大同大學學報(社會科學版)Shanxi datong da xue xue bao (she hui ke xue ban)Shanxi datong daxue xuebao (shehui kexue ban)23200923-27+30本文在前人研究基础上,结合对山西定襄关王庙大殿现存木构建筑和相关文献的梳理,认为定襄关王庙大殿在北宋宣和五年(1123年)初建时,前檐应为三开间,使用制同后檐的阑普组合,且平柱应在现明间两侧补间铺作下。元至正年间对大殿进行修葺时,前檐改用檐额,并改换前檐平柱,移至今天的位置。定襄关王庙大殿是檐额制度在元代继续使用的重要例证。通过对檐额做法和金代早期木构建筑使用内额做法的分析,笔者认为,二者在做法上应具有一定的渊源关系。 王子奇. “山西定襄关王庙考察札记.” 山西大同大学学报(社会科学版) 23, no. 04 (2009): 23-27+30. http://kns.cnki.net/KCMS/detail/detail.aspx?dbcode=CJFR&dbname=CJFD2009&filename=DTZJ200904009&uid=WEEvREcwSlJHSldRa1FhdXNXaEd1dmtCemw4MzFzR2FhRG10ZGp0MHFXMD0=$9A4hF_YAuvQ5obgVAqNKPCYcEjKensW4IQMovwHtwkF4VYPoHbKxJw!!&v=MjMxMTdZUjhlWDFMdXhZUzdEaDFUM3FUcldNMUZyQ1VSTE9mWmVkcEZ5emdWYnpCSVRuUlpMRzRIdGpNcTQ5RmI=. 王子奇, 山西定襄关王庙考察札记, 山西大同大学学报(社会科学版) 23, no. 04 (2009): 23-27+30, http://kns.cnki.net/KCMS/detail/detail.aspx?dbcode=CJFR&dbname=CJFD2009&filename=DTZJ200904009&uid=WEEvREcwSlJHSldRa1FhdXNXaEd1dmtCemw4MzFzR2FhRG10ZGp0MHFXMD0=$9A4hF_YAuvQ5obgVAqNKPCYcEjKensW4IQMovwHtwkF4VYPoHbKxJw!!&v=MjMxMTdZUjhlWDFMdXhZUzdEaDFUM3FUcldNMUZyQ1VSTE9mWmVkcEZ5emdWYnpCSVRuUlpMRzRIdGpNcTQ5RmI=.

fullText: 重敦清水潇潇武ZhongdunQingshui 由下昂考察7-12世纪中日建筑的结构系统由下昂考察7-12世紀中日建築的結構系統You xia ang kao cha 7-12 shi ji zhong ri jian zhu de jie gou xi tong You xiaang kaocha 7-12 shiji zhongri jianzh de jiegou xitonghttps://architecturasinica.org/bibl/P3LTNMW9https://www.zotero.org/groups/architecturasinica/items/P3LTNMW9https://www.zotero.org/groups/2267085/items/P3LTNMW9建筑学报建築學報Jian zhu xue baoJianzhu xuebao201749-51通过比较7-12世纪中日建筑中的下昂,指出日本的下昂深达内柱,与草架结构相联系,而佛光寺东大殿以来的中国建筑中的下昂则停留在檐柱和内柱之间的这一差异。笔者认为,日本的下昂可以看作是更古式的中国下昂,其功能不仅在于承托屋檐,更有加固草架结构之功用。并更提示了将斗栱放入整体结构系统中考察的可能性,希望借此开拓东亚建筑结构变迁与发展的新视野。 清水重敦. “由下昂考察7-12世纪中日建筑的结构系统.” Translated by 武潇潇. 建筑学报, no. 06 (2017): 49–51. 清水重敦, 由下昂考察7-12世纪中日建筑的结构系统, trans. 武潇潇, 建筑学报, no. 06 (2017): 49–51.

fullText: 白宿BaiSu西安地区唐墓壁画的布局和内容Xian diqu tang mu bihua de bujv he neironghttps://architecturasinica.org/bibl/P4P382EVhttps://www.zotero.org/groups/architecturasinica/items/P4P382EVhttps://www.zotero.org/groups/2267085/items/P4P382EV考古学报考古學報Kao gu xue baoKaoguxue bao1982137-155西安地区指今陕西省西安市及其附近诸县。在唐代,这里是京城所在和毗邻京城的京兆府雍州辖地。许多唐代皇室、贵戚、京畿大族的墓葬在这里;由于各种原因,不少外地流寓到京畿的人,死后也埋葬在这里;至于开国功臣、历朝的重要将相更以陪葬帝陵为荣。帝陵集中在今西安市附近的渭水北岸。因此,西安地区是唐代大墓集中的地点。唐代较大的墓葬一般都绘有壁画,三品官以上的大墓的壁画,内容更丰富,技艺水平更高。西安地区多唐代大墓,所以研讨唐墓壁画,解放后西安地区的发现最为重要。但西安地区 宿白. “西安地区唐墓壁画的布局和内容.” 考古学报, no. 2 (1982): 137–55. 宿白, 西安地区唐墓壁画的布局和内容, 考古学报, no. 2 (1982): 137–55.

fullText: 亭立贾TingliJia“月城”考辨「月城」考辨“Yue cheng” kao bian“Yuecheng” kaobianhttps://architecturasinica.org/bibl/PDU6MSVFhttps://www.zotero.org/groups/architecturasinica/items/PDU6MSVFhttps://www.zotero.org/groups/2267085/items/PDU6MSVF建筑与文化Jian zhu yu wen huaJianzhu yu wenhua2010104-105本文从历史文献结合实物考证,对"月城"进行考辨。"月城"源于南北朝时期的"却月城",唐代开始"月城"的叫法,指修筑于水边的半圆形军事城堡,其形似却月,因而得名。南宋,月城成为城墙防御体系的一部分,并且使用灵活,修筑的位置不同起到不同的防御作用。然而明代以后,"月城"称谓开始变得模糊。当今普遍认为"月城"即是瓮城的观点是不恰当的。 贾亭立. “‘月城’考辨.” 建筑与文化, no. 09 (2010): 104–5. 贾亭立, ‘月城’考辨, 建筑与文化, no. 09 (2010): 104–5.

fullText: 旻肖MinXiao山西应县木塔的尺度规律山西應縣木塔的尺度規律Shan xi ying xian mu ta de chi du gui luhttps://architecturasinica.org/bibl/PN7E5XHQhttps://www.zotero.org/groups/architecturasinica/items/PN7E5XHQhttps://www.zotero.org/groups/2267085/items/PN7E5XHQ西南交通大学学报西南交通大學學報Xinan jiaotong daxue xuebao2004815-818通过对山西应县木塔测绘数据的分析,在前人研究的基础上提出了尺度规律新的推定结果,进一步解释了每层各开间面阔的取值规律及木塔大尺度的比例关系.研究表明,山西应县木塔的尺度规律为模数制,基本模数为22.1cm,它控制了层高、每层通面阔和每层各开间面阔,使每层通面阔和每层各开间面阔的取值表现出简洁的递变规律.这一现象与日本飞鸟、奈良时期多重塔的规律相似,是我国唐宋时期古建筑存在模数制的一个重要例证. 肖旻. “山西应县木塔的尺度规律.” 西南交通大学学报, no. 06 (2004): 815–18. http://kns.cnki.net/KCMS/detail/detail.aspx?dbcode=CJFQ&dbname=CJFD2004&filename=XNJT200406027&v=MDkzNDllZHBGeTNnVmJ2TFBTUEJlckc0SHRYTXFZOUhZNFI4ZVgxTHV4WVM3RGgxVDNxVHJXTTFGckNVUkxPZlo=. 肖旻, 山西应县木塔的尺度规律, 西南交通大学学报, no. 06 (2004): 815–18, http://kns.cnki.net/KCMS/detail/detail.aspx?dbcode=CJFQ&dbname=CJFD2004&filename=XNJT200406027&v=MDkzNDllZHBGeTNnVmJ2TFBTUEJlckc0SHRYTXFZOUhZNFI4ZVgxTHV4WVM3RGgxVDNxVHJXTTFGckNVUkxPZlo=.

keyword: The Buddhist Conquest of China: the Spread and Adaptation of Buddhism in Early Medieval China
author: Erik Zürcher
title: The Buddhist Conquest of China: the Spread and Adaptation of Buddhism in Early Medieval China
Brill eBook titles 2007
fullText: ErikZürcherThe Buddhist Conquest of China: the Spread and Adaptation of Buddhism in Early Medieval Chinahttps://architecturasinica.org/bibl/Q7AYX72Qhttps://www.zotero.org/groups/architecturasinica/items/Q7AYX72Qhttps://www.zotero.org/groups/2267085/items/Q7AYX72Q3rd ed.LeidenBrill2007Brill eBook titles 2007'The reprinting in 2007 of a book originally produced nearly fifty years earlier (and based on a doctoral dissertation begun in the early 1950's) is not merely a publishing event. It constitutes a milestone in the academic study of early Chinese Buddhism that shows at once both how far the field has progressed in the past half-century as well as how fundamental the book remains.' (From the new Introduction.) At the repeated request of many scholars and students here is a new edition of E. Zürcher's groundbreaking The Buddhist Conquest of China . In his extensive introduction Stephen F. Teiser (D.T. Suzuki Professor in Buddhist Studies, Princeton University) explains why the book is still the standard in the field of early Chinese Buddhism. The introduction, newly written for this edition, analyzes the development of the field from the 1950's to the present. This edition is also updated by utilizing Pinyin (rather than the Wade-Giles system of the first two editions) for the transcription of Chinese and by including a thorough bibliography of E. Zürcher's more recent work. Zürcher, Erik. The Buddhist Conquest of China: The Spread and Adaptation of Buddhism in Early Medieval China. 3rd ed. Brill eBook Titles 2007. Leiden: Brill, 2007. fullText: 亭立贾薇陈TingliJiaWeiChen中国古代城墙的垛口墙形制演进轨迹中國古代城墻的垛口墻形製演進軌跡Zhongguo gu dai cheng qiang de duo kou qiang xing zhi yan jin gui ji Zhongguo gudai chengqiang de duokouqiang xingzhi yanjin guijihttps://architecturasinica.org/bibl/QEL7XC6Xhttps://www.zotero.org/groups/architecturasinica/items/QEL7XC6Xhttps://www.zotero.org/groups/2267085/items/QEL7XC6X东南大学学报 (自然科学版)東南大學學報（自然科學版）Dong nan da xue xue bao (zi ran ke xue ban)Dongnan daxue xuebao (ziran kexue ban)2010435-440垛口墙是中国古代城墙的重要组成,并成为城墙的重要标志.通过对历史文献和考古资料的梳理以及对现存实例的调查,探讨了垛口墙的起源,形制形成、发展,并且统计了部分现存的垛口墙,对其细部构造进行分析.研究结果表明,垛口墙起源于原始城墙顶部的木栅竹篱,其形制的演进主要经历了3阶段:先秦时期的单个堞墙、俾倪连排布置阶段;汉-宋时期的凸字形垛口墙阶段;宋以后的矩形垛口墙阶段.垛口墙的发展变化趋势是垛墙面积变大,垛口变窄,即保护遮蔽面积变大.垛口墙形制演进轨迹表达了兵器及攻、守城战术等变化与发展是其演进的外在动因,而筑城材料和筑城技术乃其发展的内在因素. 贾亭立, and 陈薇. “中国古代城墙的垛口墙形制演进轨迹.” 东南大学学报 (自然科学版), no. 第2期 (2010): 435–40. 贾亭立 and 陈薇, 中国古代城墙的垛口墙形制演进轨迹, 东南大学学报 (自然科学版), no. 第2期 (2010): 435–40.

author: 谭舒蓓
title: 钩阑称谓初探
fullText: 谭舒蓓钩阑称谓初探https://architecturasinica.org/bibl/S7PM474Ahttps://www.zotero.org/groups/architecturasinica/items/S7PM474Ahttps://www.zotero.org/groups/2267085/items/S7PM474A2021本文以先秦至唐宋的钩阑及相关诸名为研究对象,将诸名所指的物质形态与其常见的文学意象相对应,以探求钩阑发展演变的理路。本文首先查考《营造法式》中钩阑八名,发现作为钩阑异名的阑槛栊梐牢常与篱栅并述。结合用例分析其形态、作法、用处等,发现篱栅是通过御外起到遮拦的作用,与钩阑之守内相异,因此篱栅不为钩阑之异名。《营造法式》所述钩阑则实为“楼阁殿亭钩阑”。从槛到棂槛再到朱槛画栏,楼台钩阑称谓渐趋精致,经历了一个由质到文再到纹的过程,钩阑在诗词中之意象也逐渐固定成为符号。诗赋作者兴物铺采,物名相激,始成文理,此即钩阑之物、名、象的历史发展理路。 谭舒蓓. “钩阑称谓初探.” 硕士, 浙江大学, 2021. https://kns.cnki.net/kcms2/article/abstract?v=S5uBaE2M3OeuytWQyOtyUBYQokx8DCNI9KCwng3vL2Kf1Z_g9W-_f1vmNyRVf_KjgocCmHcx3My4s2wON69YVapopqeSXlQK6pB1hcNp1F7owNAKd0nf7M0zwoFDUwSKAs1I_Oz4sj3MuF6iptT5aw==&uniplatform=NZKPT&language=CHS. 谭舒蓓, 钩阑称谓初探 (硕士, 浙江大学, 2021), https://kns.cnki.net/kcms2/article/abstract?v=S5uBaE2M3OeuytWQyOtyUBYQokx8DCNI9KCwng3vL2Kf1Z_g9W-_f1vmNyRVf_KjgocCmHcx3My4s2wON69YVapopqeSXlQK6pB1hcNp1F7owNAKd0nf7M0zwoFDUwSKAs1I_Oz4sj3MuF6iptT5aw==&uniplatform=NZKPT&language=CHS.

fullText: Terry F.KleemanA God's Own Tale: The Book of Transformations of Wenchang, the Divine Lord of Zitonghttps://architecturasinica.org/bibl/SAX7KXTNhttps://www.zotero.org/groups/architecturasinica/items/SAX7KXTNhttps://www.zotero.org/groups/2267085/items/SAX7KXTNAlbany, New YorkState University of New York Press1994SUNY series in Chinese philosophy and cultureThis scripture was revealed through spirit writing in 1181. It traces Wenchang's development through his many transformations culminating in his apotheosis as director of the Wenchang Palace and custodian of the Cinnamon Record that determines men's and women's fates. The god has since assumed a high position in the Taoist pantheon, has been introduced into the school system and Confucian temples, and now controls the all-important civil service examinations in China., The text translated here provides a unique window into the religious world of Traditional China. Numerous anecdotes of good- and evil-doers reveal the ethical dilemmas facing men and women of the time, from social questions like infanticide and discrimination against women to more purely religious issues such as how evil gods are punished and how China's divergent religious traditions can be reconciled. Kleeman, Terry F. A God’s Own Tale: The Book of Transformations of Wenchang, the Divine Lord of Zitong. SUNY Series in Chinese Philosophy and Culture. Albany, New York: State University of New York Press, 1994. Terry F. Kleeman, A God’s Own Tale: The Book of Transformations of Wenchang, the Divine Lord of Zitong, SUNY Series in Chinese Philosophy and Culture (Albany, New York: State University of New York Press, 1994).

fullText: 郭华瑜中国古典建筑形制源流https://architecturasinica.org/bibl/SBDQVDSFhttps://www.zotero.org/groups/architecturasinica/items/SBDQVDSFhttps://www.zotero.org/groups/2267085/items/SBDQVDSF武汉湖北教育出版社2015-02中国建筑文化研究文库： 本书从单体形制一面出发，纵向与横向的展开研究，在多元视角下重新审视中国古典建筑形制的发展轨迹，不用时期的形制选择、沿袭及其变化。建筑形制是建筑文化重要的文化符号，对建筑形制的探讨无疑会加深我们对中国建筑文化的理解。 郭华瑜. 中国古典建筑形制源流. 中国建筑文化研究文库. 武汉: 湖北教育出版社, 2015. https://book.duxiu.com/views/specific/4010/bookDetail.jsp?dxNumber=000015428721. 郭华瑜, 中国古典建筑形制源流, 中国建筑文化研究文库 (武汉: 湖北教育出版社, 2015), https://book.duxiu.com/views/specific/4010/bookDetail.jsp?dxNumber=000015428721.

fullText: 鸿鹭雷源林HongluLeiYuanLin 从西安兴教寺玄奘塔看唐时普拍方的运用兼论其起源從西安興教寺玄奘塔看唐時普拍方的運用兼論其起源Cong Xi an Xing jiao si Xuan zang ta kan tang shi pu pai fang de yun yong jian lun qi qi yuanCong Xi'an Xingjiaosi Xuanzangta kan tangshi pupaifang de yunyong jianlun qi qiyuanhttps://architecturasinica.org/bibl/SDUCWPFYhttps://www.zotero.org/groups/architecturasinica/items/SDUCWPFYhttps://www.zotero.org/groups/2267085/items/SDUCWPFY建筑与文化2018233-234普拍方是置于柱头之上联系柱子和铺作层的横向构件,在辽、金、明、清时期建筑中广泛使用。最早使用普拍方的建筑实例为初建于唐高宗总章二年（669年）,重建于唐文宗太和二年（828年）的西安兴教寺玄奘塔,因而普拍方的出现年代可上溯至唐。就现存唐至五代实例和壁画来看,普拍方的应用并不广泛。因而文章从玄奘塔本身及南北朝时期的建筑形象来追溯普拍方的源头,认为南北朝时期常见的横楣分化出普拍方和阑额两种形式,也正因为两者在功能上部分重叠且柱间阑额于唐时成为主流,致使普拍方于时寥寥。 雷鸿鹭, and 林源. “从西安兴教寺玄奘塔看唐时普拍方的运用兼论其起源.” 建筑与文化, no. 10 (2018): 233–34. 雷鸿鹭 and 林源, 从西安兴教寺玄奘塔看唐时普拍方的运用兼论其起源, 建筑与文化, no. 10 (2018): 233–34.

fullText: 莉娜俞莉娜LinaYu中原北方地区宋金墓葬中仿木构门窗的形制流变及设计意匠中原北方地區宋金墓葬中仿木構門窗的形制流變及設計意匠zhong yuan bei fang di qu Song-Jin mu zang zhong fang mu gou men chuang de xing zhi liu bian ji she ji yi jiangzhongyuan beifang diqu Song-Jin muzang zhong fangmugou menchuang de xingzhi liubian ji sheji yijianghttps://architecturasinica.org/bibl/SFNB9RJKhttps://www.zotero.org/groups/architecturasinica/items/SFNB9RJKhttps://www.zotero.org/groups/2267085/items/SFNB9RJK新建筑新建築xin jian zhuxin jianzhu202332-38以宋金墓葬中的仿木构门窗为主要研究对象，通过形制分类（即排比分期），将仿木构门窗的发展过程分为3期，主要表现为一门二窗的组合模式向格子门转变，整体呈现出从简练到复杂的演变路径；进而将墓葬仿木构门窗与《营造法式》《梓人遗制》两部古代文献进行对照研究，认为仿木构门窗的发展过程大致与地面木构建筑的演变过程相符，可对文献记载起到印证作用；同时，尝试探讨了几种地区性典型门窗布局的空间含义。门窗因其通过属性和对建筑立面的示意作用，在墓葬中起到映射家居场景、提供魂魄出入口的作用，门窗的屏障属性也使得其在部分地区墓葬中起到烘托祭祀氛围的作用，是墓葬供养空间塑造中重要的元素之一。 俞莉娜. “中原北方地区宋金墓葬中仿木构门窗的形制流变及设计意匠.” 新建筑, 2023, 32–38. 俞莉娜, 中原北方地区宋金墓葬中仿木构门窗的形制流变及设计意匠, 新建筑, 2023, 32–38.

keyword: Buddhist Pilgrim-monks as Agents of Cultural and Artistic Transmission: the International Buddhist Art Style in East Asia, ca. 645-770
author: Dorothy C. Wong
title: Buddhist Pilgrim-monks as Agents of Cultural and Artistic Transmission: the International Buddhist Art Style in East Asia, ca. 645-770
fullText: Dorothy C.WongBuddhist Pilgrim-monks as Agents of Cultural and Artistic Transmission: the International Buddhist Art Style in East Asia, ca. 645-770https://architecturasinica.org/bibl/SJTJC8M3https://www.zotero.org/groups/architecturasinica/items/SJTJC8M3https://www.zotero.org/groups/2267085/items/SJTJC8M3SingaporeNUS Press2018In the mid-seventh century, a class of Buddhist pilgrim-monks disseminated an art style in China, Japan, and Korea that was uniform in both iconography and formal properties. Traveling between the courts and religious centers of the region, these pilgrim-monks played a powerful role in this proto-cosmopolitanism, promulgating what came to be known as the International Buddhist Art Style. In Buddhist Pilgrim-Monks as Agents of Cultural and Artistic Transmission, Dorothy C. Wong argues that the visual expression found in this robust new art style arose alongside the ascendant theory of the Buddhist state, and directly influenced it. Aided by lavish illustrations, Wong's book shows that the visual language transmitted and circulated by these pilgrim-monks served as a key agent in shaping the cultural landscape of Northeast Asia. This is the first major study of the vital role played by Buddhist pilgrim-monks in conveying the notions of Buddhist kingship via artistic communication. Wong's interdisciplinary analysis will attract scholars in Asian art history and religious studies. Wong, Dorothy C. Buddhist Pilgrim-Monks as Agents of Cultural and Artistic Transmission: The International Buddhist Art Style in East Asia, ca. 645-770. Singapore: NUS Press, 2018. Dorothy C. Wong, Buddhist Pilgrim-Monks as Agents of Cultural and Artistic Transmission: The International Buddhist Art Style in East Asia, ca. 645-770 (Singapore: NUS Press, 2018).

keyword: 正定县城寺庙建筑研究初探
author: 轲 贾
title: 正定县城寺庙建筑研究初探
fullText: 轲贾小平滕正定县城寺庙建筑研究初探https://architecturasinica.org/bibl/T9GEEPA9https://www.zotero.org/groups/architecturasinica/items/T9GEEPA9https://www.zotero.org/groups/2267085/items/T9GEEPA9西安2015中国文化博大精深，中国建筑承载着中国文化。我们研究中国传统建筑可以继承和发扬中国文化并益于中国建筑的一脉相承。寺院建筑作为中国传统建筑的一种类型，对研究中国传统建筑提供了很好的实体。正定县作为中国历史文化名城，其县城内现存的不同时代不同特点的寺院建筑具有很高的研究价值。通过对正定县现存寺院建筑的考察研究，力求准确掌握寺院的实测资料，并通过这些资料的整理和对比总结一定的结论。正定县历史悠久城内曾经寺院众多，可见正定县在辉煌时历史积淀的结果。要研究正定的寺院建筑必定要追根溯源，拨开历史云雾，必能使人眼前呈现其中的建筑之美、历史之美。此文旨在对正定县现存寺院建筑群的总体布局、单个寺院整体布局、寺院的主体建筑、寺院内塔及其几个寺院对比上进行较深入探究。这其中对单体研究的对象有所筛选，筛选的原则是前人研究的程度不高的建筑优先、重点研究。研究过程本着发现问题，理解问题，解决问题的思路深入解释所遇到的疑惑。 在研究过程不可避免的会涉及到中国传统文化、佛教文化以及中国传统文化对佛教文化的同化，因为只有有了对这些文化底蕴的了解才能更深入认识到中国寺院建筑中人的建造行为和目的。研究的目的是为了更好的保护这些古建筑，保护这些佛寺能够使得当地的佛教文化有所传承和发展。保护不仅仅是保护古佛寺本身，更要保护其所给人带来的深层次感受 贾轲. “正定县城寺庙建筑研究初探.” 西安建筑科技大学, 2015. 贾轲, 正定县城寺庙建筑研究初探 (西安建筑科技大学, 2015).

fullText: 十庆张ShiqingZhang江南厅堂井字型构架的解析与比较——以保国寺大殿为主线江南廳堂井字型構架的解析與比較Jiang nan ting tang jing zi xing gou jia de jie xi yu bi jiao ——yi Bao guo si da dian wei zhu xianJiangnan tingtang jingzixing goujia de jiexi yu bijiao--yi Baoguosi dadian wei zhuxianhttps://architecturasinica.org/bibl/TRCTCYM9https://www.zotero.org/groups/architecturasinica/items/TRCTCYM9https://www.zotero.org/groups/2267085/items/TRCTCYM9中国建筑史论汇刊2015167-182构架体系特征是木构技术分析的一个重要线索,江南自宋以来传承的厅堂构架技术,其特点之一可概括为井字型构架形式。本文分析和比较了江南厅堂井字型构架的独特性和独立性,认为其实质反映了江南地域构架的体系特征,希望通过井字型构架技术的解析,认识以保国寺大殿为代表的江南地域构架体系的性质与特点。 张十庆. “江南厅堂井字型构架的解析与比较——以保国寺大殿为主线.” 中国建筑史论汇刊, no. 01 (2015): 167–82. http://kns.cnki.net/KCMS/detail/detail.aspx?dbcode=CCJD&dbname=CCJDLAST2&filename=JZLH201501007&v=MjkzMTkxRnJDVVJMT2ZaZWRvRmlEaFViek9MemZIWnJHNEg5VE1ybzlGWTRSOGVYMUx1eFlTN0RoMVQzcVRyV00=. 张十庆, 江南厅堂井字型构架的解析与比较——以保国寺大殿为主线, 中国建筑史论汇刊, no. 01 (2015): 167–82, http://kns.cnki.net/KCMS/detail/detail.aspx?dbcode=CCJD&dbname=CCJDLAST2&filename=JZLH201501007&v=MjkzMTkxRnJDVVJMT2ZaZWRvRmlEaFViek9MemZIWnJHNEg5VE1ybzlGWTRSOGVYMUx1eFlTN0RoMVQzcVRyV00=.

fullText: 路珂李LukeLi神衹之居——中国建筑、文献与图像中的平坐(阳台)神衹之居——中國建築、文獻與圖像中的平坐(陽臺)Shen qi zhi ju: zhong guo jian zhu, wen xian yu tu xiang zhong de ping zuo (yang tai)Shenqi zhiju: zhongguo jianzhu, wenxian yu tuxiang zhong de pingzuo (yangtai)https://architecturasinica.org/bibl/TUD5VXCHhttps://www.zotero.org/groups/architecturasinica/items/TUD5VXCHhttps://www.zotero.org/groups/2267085/items/TUD5VXCH世界建筑202024-29+137在中国古代的建筑文本中,"阳台"拥有"阁道""平坐"等名称,它从未成为"居住机器"的部件,却一直是"神祗之居"的标志。本文基于建筑文献、实物与图像,对平坐(阳台)在结构、功能、形式、意义诸方面进行了历时性的考察。在长时段的视野下,本文试图揭示:"平坐"(阳台)作为在中国建筑体系中延续了数千年的元素之一,如何经由"实现"和"再现",超越了建筑的"实在",成为一种用以阐释世界、信仰和理想的"图像"。 李路珂. “神衹之居——中国建筑、文献与图像中的平坐(阳台).” 世界建筑, no. 10 (2020): 24-29+137. https://doi.org/10.16414/j.wa.2020.10.003. 李路珂, 神衹之居——中国建筑、文献与图像中的平坐(阳台), 世界建筑, no. 10 (2020): 24-29+137, https://doi.org/10.16414/j.wa.2020.10.003.

keyword: The Earliest Known Edition of "The Precious Scroll of Incense Mountain" and the Connections Between Precious Scrolls and Buddhist Preaching
author: Rostislav Berezkin
Boris L. Riftin
title: The Earliest Known Edition of "The Precious Scroll of Incense Mountain" and the Connections Between Precious Scrolls and Buddhist Preaching
T'oung Pao
fullText: RostislavBerezkinBoris L.RiftinThe Earliest Known Edition of "The Precious Scroll of Incense Mountain" and the Connections Between Precious Scrolls and Buddhist Preachinghttps://architecturasinica.org/bibl/USUG7MG2https://www.zotero.org/groups/architecturasinica/items/USUG7MG2https://www.zotero.org/groups/2267085/items/USUG7MG2T'oung Pao99Brill2013445-499[This article introduces a reprint made in Hanoi in 1772 of an undated Chinese edition, originally published in Nanjing, of The Precious Scroll of Incense Mountain (Xiangshan baojuan). This edition, called the "Nanjing redaction" in the article, was preserved only partially as a ritual manual in China. Yet it provides important evidence for determining the early date of production of the text. By comparing certain features in the Nanjing redaction and in other redactions that circulated in China, it can be established that the Nanjing redaction is the earliest known to us. Its significance within the history of the baojuan genre is discussed, with special attention paid to the unique form and content of the text. Cet article présente la réimpression, réalisée à Hanoï en 1722, d'une édition chinoise non datée, originellement publiée à Nankin, du Rouleau précieux de la Montagne de l'Encens (Xiangshan baojuan). Appelée "version de Nankin" dans l'article, cette édition n'a survécu que partiellement en Chine comme manuel de rituel. Elle fournit pourtant d'importants indices sur l'ancienneté de la composition du texte. En comparant certains aspects de la version de Nankin et d'autres versions ayant circulé en Chine, il est possible d'établir que la version de Nankin et la plus ancienne qui nous soit parvenue. Son importance dans l'histoire du genre baojuan fait l'objet d'un examen dans lequel une attention particulière est accordée à l'originalité de la forme et du contenu du texte.] Berezkin, Rostislav, and Boris L. Riftin. “The Earliest Known Edition of ‘The Precious Scroll of Incense Mountain’ and the Connections Between Precious Scrolls and Buddhist Preaching.” T’oung Pao 99, no. 4/5 (2013): 445–99. http://www.jstor.org.proxy.library.vanderbilt.edu/stable/24754961. Rostislav Berezkin and Boris L. Riftin, The Earliest Known Edition of ‘The Precious Scroll of Incense Mountain’ and the Connections Between Precious Scrolls and Buddhist Preaching, T’oung Pao 99, no. 4/5 (2013): 445–99, http://www.jstor.org.proxy.library.vanderbilt.edu/stable/24754961.

author: 明达 陈
Mingda Chen
title: 蓟县独乐寺
fullText: 明达陈MingdaChen蓟县独乐寺https://architecturasinica.org/bibl/V9EC66BWhttps://www.zotero.org/groups/architecturasinica/items/V9EC66BWhttps://www.zotero.org/groups/2267085/items/V9EC66BW1天津大学出版社2007早在1984年,陈明达先生曾评价道:“独乐寺两建筑,按现存古建筑年代排列,名居第七,但若论技术之精湛艺术之品第,均应推为第一,可以说是现存古建筑中的上上品,最佳的范例。为进一步阐释他的这一观点,约六年之后,陈先生于1990年完成了一篇重要的文稿《独乐寺观音阁、山门的大木制度》,在此文中,作者似乎完全进入到了古代建筑师的世界,不但解析着一个个技术方面的疑难,更通过技术问题的解析而还原到审美性的文化层面,遂追索出若干条中国建筑在结构力学建筑美学等方面的独到建树在中国建筑历史研究史上,梁思成先生于1932年发表《蓟县独乐寺观音阁山门考》一文标志着中国建筑历史研究正式引进了西方科学性的田野考察”方法;陈明达先生于1966年完成的《应县木塔》则初步证明中国木构建筑是有设计规律可循的,同时这部书为建筑界、文物保护界树立了一个集研究论著与测绘图、摄影资料于一身的范例,现在,时隔近半个世纪,我们将历年来中国营造学社,中国文物研究所天津大学等单位积累下来的对独乐寺观音阁、山门二建筑的测绘图、照片、陈明达先生的建筑分析图以及《建筑创作》杂志社最新的专题摄影,与陈明达先生原论文合编为一部专著正式出版面世,我们深信,此举除续接《应县木塔》为专业人士提供高水平研究专著的传统之外,还将为所有热爱中国建筑、中国传统文化的广大读者提供一个高水平的艺术欣赏图籍。 陈明达. 蓟县独乐寺. 1st ed. 天津大学出版社, 2007. http://www.worldcat.org/oclc/1003327180. 陈明达, 蓟县独乐寺, 1st ed. (天津大学出版社, 2007), http://www.worldcat.org/oclc/1003327180.

fullText: 宇周YuZhou《营造法式》中几个名词辨析《營造法式》中幾個名詞辨析“Ying zao fa shi" zhong ji ge ming ci bian xihttps://architecturasinica.org/bibl/VLDFWXPXhttps://www.zotero.org/groups/architecturasinica/items/VLDFWXPXhttps://www.zotero.org/groups/2267085/items/VLDFWXPX建筑史2005117-122宋《营造法式》是中国第一部建筑专著。由于各种原因,其语言贴近当时的口语,因此造成了一些基本概念的模糊,本文尝试通过对营造法式出现的"殿宇"、"殿屋"、"殿阁"、"楼阁"、"殿堂"、"厅堂"、"殿"等名词的总结和分析,明确其含义,使后来的读者能够在理解上消除歧义。 周宇. “《营造法式》中几个名词辨析.” 建筑史, no. 00 (2005): 117–22. https://kns.cnki.net/kns/detail/detail.aspx?QueryID=0&CurRec=1&recid=&FileName=JNZS200500013&DbName=CCJDLAST2&DbCode=CCJD&yx=&pr=&URLID=&bsm=J0103; 周宇, 《营造法式》中几个名词辨析, 建筑史, no. 00 (2005): 117–22, https://kns.cnki.net/kns/detail/detail.aspx?QueryID=0&CurRec=1&recid=&FileName=JNZS200500013&DbName=CCJDLAST2&DbCode=CCJD&yx=&pr=&URLID=&bsm=J0103;

fullText: 谷西潘建中何《营造法式》解读 第二版https://architecturasinica.org/bibl/VXTEVIR4https://www.zotero.org/groups/architecturasinica/items/VXTEVIR4https://www.zotero.org/groups/2267085/items/VXTEVIR42南京东南大学出版社2017《营造法式》是我国古代很严密和科学的建筑专业技术典籍，系统、全面地记载着宋代建筑的制度、做法、用工、图样等珍贵资料，对研究中国建筑、理解其理念和精神有着深远的意义。不同于梁思成先生的《营造法式注释》的注疏，亦不同于陈明达先生《营造法式大木作研究》的专项研究，潘谷西先生和何建中先生经过二十多年的研究和实践，结合现存古建实例、考古发现、区域间文化与技术传播等方面的考察，写成本书，提出独到见解。由潘谷西、何建中著的《营造法式解读(修订版)(精)》内容涉及《法式》所录各工种（壕寨、石作、大木作、小木作、雕作、旋作、锯作、竹作、瓦作、泥作、彩画作、砖作、窑作共13工种）。 潘谷西, and 何建中. 《营造法式》解读 第二版. 2nd ed. 南京: 东南大学出版社, 2017. 潘谷西 and 何建中, 《营造法式》解读 第二版, 2nd ed. (南京: 东南大学出版社, 2017).

fullText: 十庆张ShiqingZhang《营造法式》的技术源流及其与江南建筑的关联探析《營造法式》的技術源流及其與江南建築的關聯探析"Ying zao fa shi" de ji shu yuan liu ji qi yu jiang nan jian zhu de guan lian tan xi"Yingzao fashi" de jishu yuanliu jiqi yu jiangnan jianzhu de guanlian tanxihttps://architecturasinica.org/bibl/WC7CSTU4https://www.zotero.org/groups/architecturasinica/items/WC7CSTU4https://www.zotero.org/groups/2267085/items/WC7CSTU4建筑史论文集20021-11+274《营造法式》作为北宋王朝颁行的建筑营缮法规制度,代表和反映了北方官式建筑的制度与作法,然《法式》内容与江南作法又有相当的关联,此既反映了宋代南北建筑技术的交流与融合,同时也表现了唐宋以来南北建筑地域特色的不同倾向。本文就《法式》内容的地域特色及其南方因素试作比较和探讨。 张十庆. “《营造法式》的技术源流及其与江南建筑的关联探析.” 建筑史论文集, no. 03 (2002): 1-11+274. 张十庆, 《营造法式》的技术源流及其与江南建筑的关联探析, 建筑史论文集, no. 03 (2002): 1-11+274.

fullText: 梦哲喻盛健惠MengzheYuShengjianHui基于《营造法式》“缠柱造”做法复原的“楼—阁”概念辨析基於《營造法式》“纏柱造”做法復原的“樓—閣”概念辨析Ji yu "Ying zao fa shi" chan zhu zao zuo fa fu yuan de lou-ge gai nian bian xiJiyu "Yingzao fashi" chanzhuzao zuofa fuyuan de lou-ge gainian bianxihttps://architecturasinica.org/bibl/WFKKPJYHhttps://www.zotero.org/groups/architecturasinica/items/WFKKPJYHhttps://www.zotero.org/groups/2267085/items/WFKKPJYH建筑师202195-102楼层间的构造关系是建筑史研究的一个重点,围绕《营造法式》所录"缠柱造"做法,目前已有多个复原方案,但构件间的安放位置仍有疑点。文章将"叉柱造"与"缠柱造"的对比工作从局部构造表现上升到整体结构层面,尝试证明两种"柱造"与"楼、阁"类型间的映照关系,并分析平坐在"楼、阁"概念分化过程中扮演的角色,从而提出契合重楼建构特质的"缠柱造"方案。 喻梦哲, and 惠盛健. “基于《营造法式》‘缠柱造’做法复原的‘楼—阁’概念辨析.” 建筑师, no. 3 (2021): 95–102. https://kns.cnki.net/KCMS/detail/detail.aspx?dbcode=CJFD&dbname=CJFDLAST2021&filename=JZSS202103012&v=. 喻梦哲 and 惠盛健, 基于《营造法式》‘缠柱造’做法复原的‘楼—阁’概念辨析, 建筑师, no. 3 (2021): 95–102, https://kns.cnki.net/KCMS/detail/detail.aspx?dbcode=CJFD&dbname=CJFDLAST2021&filename=JZSS202103012&v=.

fullText: 月前王伟华佟YueqianWangWeihuaTong垣曲商城遗址的发掘与研究垣曲商城遺址的發掘與研究Yuan qu shang cheng yi zhi de fa jue yu yan jiuYuanqu shangcheng yizhi de fajue yu yanjiuhttps://architecturasinica.org/bibl/WL62FA52https://www.zotero.org/groups/architecturasinica/items/WL62FA52https://www.zotero.org/groups/2267085/items/WL62FA52考古考古Kao guKaogu20053-18垣曲商城是商代前期地处夏商文化中心区域的重要城址之一,是商文化研究的重要对象。通过回顾和总结垣曲商城的发现和发掘过程、城址形制和布局、城内遗迹遗物,以及对商城的时代和性质、商城所住在区的聚落形态演变过程的研究成果进行综述,应对今后的发掘和研究工作有所裨益。 王月前, and 佟伟华. “垣曲商城遗址的发掘与研究.” 考古, no. 11 (2005): 3–18. https://kns.cnki.net/kns/detail/detail.aspx?QueryID=4&CurRec=3&recid=&FileName=KAGU200511000&DbName=CJFD2005&DbCode=CJFQ&yx=&pr=&URLID=&bsm=QS0101; 王月前 and 佟伟华, 垣曲商城遗址的发掘与研究, 考古, no. 11 (2005): 3–18, https://kns.cnki.net/kns/detail/detail.aspx?QueryID=4&CurRec=3&recid=&FileName=KAGU200511000&DbName=CJFD2005&DbCode=CJFQ&yx=&pr=&URLID=&bsm=QS0101;

fullText: 許慎王平PingWang李建廷《說文解字》標點整理本: 附分類檢索https://architecturasinica.org/bibl/WLS8IYL4https://www.zotero.org/groups/architecturasinica/items/WLS8IYL4https://www.zotero.org/groups/2267085/items/WLS8IYL41ShanghaiShanghai shudian chubanshe2016Detailed summary in vernacular field only., 东汉许慎撰《说文解字》, 是我国第一部系统的分析字形和考究字源的字书, 以其创制的六书理论系统分析字形, 解释字义. 本书整理底本依据目前流传最广的清孙星衍刻本, 及《说文解字》大徐本, 除标点整理, 还编制有现代汉语拟音, 编制部首, 拼音和笔画索引. 更有《说文》用术语分类检所, 可供研究者参考, 这也是本书的一大特色. 許慎. 《說文解字》標點整理本: 附分類檢索. Edited by 王平, Wang Ping, and 李建廷. 1st ed. Shanghai: Shanghai shudian chubanshe, 2016. 許慎, 《說文解字》標點整理本: 附分類檢索, ed. 王平, Wang Ping, and 李建廷, 1st ed. (Shanghai: Shanghai shudian chubanshe, 2016).

fullText: 玉峰谭Tan上海的塔(二)上海的塔(二)Shanghai de ta (er)Shanghai de ta (er)https://architecturasinica.org/bibl/WUDDY8ZFhttps://www.zotero.org/groups/architecturasinica/items/WUDDY8ZFhttps://www.zotero.org/groups/2267085/items/WUDDY8ZF上海文博论丛上海文博論叢Shanghai wen bo lun congShanghai wenbo luncong2200290-91兴圣教寺塔兴圣教寺塔又称松江方塔,位于松江区松江镇中山东路方塔园内。兴圣教寺塔始建于北宋熙宁、元祐年间（1068-1093）。该塔为楼阁式砖木结构,平面呈方形,共有九级,总高42.56米,砖身各层均有木结构腰檐、平座和栏杆。据历史记载,该塔在元、明、清三代时,均有程度不同 谭玉峰. “上海的塔(二).” 上海文博论丛 2 (2002): 90–91. 谭玉峰, 上海的塔(二), 上海文博论丛 2 (2002): 90–91.

fullText: 净诸葛建筑类型问题：从厅、堂说起——居住：从中国传统住宅到相关问题系列研究之二建築類型問題：從廳，堂說起--居住：從中國傳統住宅到相關問題系列研究之二Jian zhu lei xing wen ti: cong ting tang shuo qi ju zhu cong zhongguo chuan tong zhu zhai dao xiang guan wen ti xi lie yan jiu zhi erJianzhu leixing wenti: cong ting tang shuoqi juzhu cong zhongguo chuantong zhuzhai dao xiangguan wenti xilie yanjiu zhi erhttps://architecturasinica.org/bibl/XMRCCXRYhttps://www.zotero.org/groups/architecturasinica/items/XMRCCXRYhttps://www.zotero.org/groups/2267085/items/XMRCCXRY建筑师建築師Jian zhu shiJianzhushi2016a6-12中国古代建筑的分类问题始终令人困惑,不同文献中提及的类型无论在名称还是在分类标准上都没有明显的规则。本文试图由厅、堂在不同时期的实例和文献中的涵义出发,分析中国古代建筑知识中是否存在可理解的分类标准。最终本文将指出中国古代建筑文本中,建筑分类事实上包含三种话语:意识形态,匠作体系,国家制度。这一方面解释了表面上混乱的分类原则,另一方面也表明对中国古代建筑的认识必须基于对此三种话语既区分又整合的考虑。 诸葛净. “建筑类型问题：从厅、堂说起——居住：从中国传统住宅到相关问题系列研究之二.” 建筑师, no. 第4期 (2016a): 6–12. 诸葛净, 建筑类型问题：从厅、堂说起——居住：从中国传统住宅到相关问题系列研究之二, 建筑师, no. 第4期 (2016a): 6–12.

fullText: 友恒刘平杜 Youheng LiuPing Du梁思成与正定开元寺钟楼梁思成與正定開元寺鐘樓Liang si cheng yu zheng ding kai yuan si zhong louLiangsicheng yu zhengding kaiyuan si zhonglouhttps://architecturasinica.org/bibl/XZJ4YTXFhttps://www.zotero.org/groups/architecturasinica/items/XZJ4YTXFhttps://www.zotero.org/groups/2267085/items/XZJ4YTXF档案天地檔案天地Dang an tian diDangan tiandi202217-20<正>正定开元寺钟楼是一座无明确纪年但具早期建筑特征的二层楼阁建筑，在中国建筑史上占有重要地位。我国著名建筑学家梁思成先生曾于1933年4月、11月，1963年3月先后三次来正定对其进行考察，并以图文形式展示研究成果，不仅根据建筑特征确定该钟楼为唐代遗构，而且还为后世重修勾勒出基本方案。开元寺是正定古城八大寺院中始建年代最早的一座。在其发展进程中，历经了东魏兴和二年（公元540年）静观寺、隋开皇十一年（公元591年）解慧寺、武周天授元年（公元690元）大云寺、唐开元二十六年（公元738年）开元寺几次寺名更易。静观寺、解慧寺是以富含深刻哲理的佛教术语命名，而大云寺、开元寺则是由皇帝诏敕在全国诸州统一设立、统一寺额且承担若干特殊功能的官立佛教寺院。 刘友恒, and 杜平. “梁思成与正定开元寺钟楼.” 档案天地, no. 9 (2022): 17–20. 刘友恒 and 杜平, 梁思成与正定开元寺钟楼, 档案天地, no. 9 (2022): 17–20.

fullText: 静温JingWen 结合中日遗构探讨昂装饰性的演变結合中日遺構探討昂裝飾性的演變Jie he zhong ri yi gou tan tao ang zhuang shi xing de yan bian Jiehe zhongri yigou tantao ang zhuagnshixing de yanbianhttps://architecturasinica.org/bibl/Y2XFHEPYhttps://www.zotero.org/groups/architecturasinica/items/Y2XFHEPYhttps://www.zotero.org/groups/2267085/items/Y2XFHEPY20131-8昂是东亚体系木构建筑重要的构造节点,伴随大木构架的结构发展,外檐铺作中所使用的昂也逐渐发生变化,其总体趋势表现为装饰性的不断增强。现存中日古代木构建筑中呈现的多样化的用昂形式,恰体现了昂的结构性与装饰性此消彼涨的演变过程。本文通过考察柱头铺作与补间铺作中的昂的发展过程,试图解读各类型装饰性昂的产生背景,及中日遗构各自的传承与发展,探求斗棋形式及其变迁背后所蕴含的古人对斗栱装饰性的理解。 温静. “结合中日遗构探讨昂装饰性的演变.” In 宁波保国寺大殿建成1000周年学术研讨会暨中国建筑史学分会2013年会论文集, 1–8, 2013. 温静, 结合中日遗构探讨昂装饰性的演变, in 宁波保国寺大殿建成1000周年学术研讨会暨中国建筑史学分会2013年会论文集, 2013, 1–8.

keyword: Crafting Boundaries of the Unseeable World: Dialectics of Space in the Bhagavat Sutra Repository
author: Jeehee Hong
title: Crafting Boundaries of the Unseeable World: Dialectics of Space in the Bhagavat Sutra Repository
Art History
fullText: JeeheeHongCrafting Boundaries of the Unseeable World: Dialectics of Space in the Bhagavat Sutra Repositoryhttps://architecturasinica.org/bibl/YCVRHHE9https://www.zotero.org/groups/architecturasinica/items/YCVRHHE9https://www.zotero.org/groups/2267085/items/YCVRHHE9Art History402017/210-37The Bhagavat Sutra Repository (1038) in China, celebrated as the earliest extant wood-construction repository of sutras in East Asia, includes elaborate wood cabinets in the shape of miniaturized architecture. Challenging the traditional treatment of the cabinets as merely a model for reconstructing the middle-period architecture in northern China, this essay examines contemporaneous visual, technological, and religious knowledge cutting across Buddhist and funerary discourses that natured the emergence of the distinctive structure. In so doing, this study showcases the complex ways in which boundaries between the mundane and the sacred were visualized at the dawn of the second millennium in China. Hong, Jeehee. “Crafting Boundaries of the Unseeable World: Dialectics of Space in the Bhagavat Sutra Repository.” Art History 40, no. 1 (February 2017): 10–37. https://doi.org/10.1111/1467-8365.12231. Jeehee Hong, Crafting Boundaries of the Unseeable World: Dialectics of Space in the Bhagavat Sutra Repository, Art History 40, no. 1 (February 2017): 10–37, https://doi.org/10.1111/1467-8365.12231.

fullText: 毅捷张寅李效韩YijieZhangYinLi XiaoHan试论普拍方的起源試論普拍方的起源Shi lun pu pai fang de qi yuanShilun pupaifang de qiyuanhttps://architecturasinica.org/bibl/YM5ISNCYhttps://www.zotero.org/groups/architecturasinica/items/YM5ISNCYhttps://www.zotero.org/groups/2267085/items/YM5ISNCY华中建筑362018118-120目前比较普遍的观点认为普拍方是因补间铺作的存在而存在的构件,该文结合中国和日本的古建筑实例,以及《营造法式》中的相关记载,认为普拍方可能起源自皿板,是建筑技术进步的结果。进一步的研究显示,普拍方最先出现在早期的多层木结构建筑的平坐中,促其产生的原因应当是工匠们希望上层木结构有一个更加平稳的基座——平坐。这样做既延续和强调了皿板找平的结构功能,而普拍方在施工上又远比皿板简单明了,同时普拍方的出现也有利于构造体的刚度、强度、构造和稳定。 张毅捷, 李寅, and 韩效. “试论普拍方的起源.” 华中建筑 36, no. 05 (2018): 118–20. https://doi.org/10.13942/j.cnki.hzjz.2018.05.027. 张毅捷, 李寅, and 韩效, 试论普拍方的起源, 华中建筑 36, no. 05 (2018): 118–20, https://doi.org/10.13942/j.cnki.hzjz.2018.05.027.

文物建筑

fullText: 易兵谢毅捷张晗瑞罗XieZhangLuo上昂、挑斡、昂桯辨(上)上昂、挑斡、昂桯辨(上)Shang ang, tiao wo, ang ting, bian (shang)Shang'ang, tiaowo, angting bian(shang)https://architecturasinica.org/bibl/YSQ8R2QLhttps://www.zotero.org/groups/architecturasinica/items/YSQ8R2QLhttps://www.zotero.org/groups/2267085/items/YSQ8R2QL文物建筑文物建築Wen wu jian zhuWenwu jianzhu20201-18上昂、挑斡、昂桯是《营造法式》中记载的三个古建筑名词,从以往的研究来看,几者常常混淆不清,近年朱永春和林琳对相关问题做了深入细致的探讨,研究有了重大突破,但其中仍存疑问。本文深入剖析了《营造法式》的相关条文,再从"桯"字的古汉语释义出发尝试诠释昂桯的具体所指。结果表明:上昂、挑斡、昂桯均是用于铺作里跳的斜向构件。上昂用于设平棊的建筑中,用来直接或者间接支撑平棊方、井口方,也可用于平坐铺作中来直接或间接支撑铺版方;挑斡是下昂昂尾上挑简单斗栱组合的做法,用于徹上明造建筑中直接或者间接上挑下平榑(方);昂桯也用于徹上明造建筑,用来支撑挑斡。 谢易兵, 张毅捷, and 罗晗瑞. “上昂、挑斡、昂桯辨(上).” 文物建筑, no. 00 (2020): 1–18. 谢易兵, 张毅捷, and 罗晗瑞, 上昂、挑斡、昂桯辨(上), 文物建筑, no. 00 (2020): 1–18.
